segments.transliteration: wa sahhil matlabi wa wassi` `alayya fi rizqi

translation.en: make easy for me to attain my aim, and expand Your sustenance to me,
for I am too weak to do that.
(Please) overlook the evil I have done
in the name of the good You always do,
do not make me suffer from the loss of myself,
and do not make me suffer from the loss of one I intimately love.

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِي يَا إِلٰهِي لَحْظَةً مِنْ لَحَظَاتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hab li ya ilahi lahzatan min lahazatika

translation.en: (Please) grant me, O my God, one of Your glances

segments.arabic: تَكْشِفُ بِهَا عَنِّي جَمِيعَ مَا بِهِ ابْتَلَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: takshifu biha `anni jami`a ma bihi ibtalaytani

translation.en: through which You may relieve me from all what You have tested me through

segments.arabic: وَتَرُدُّ بِهَا عَلَيَّ مَا هُوَ أَحْسَنُ عَادَتِكَ عِنْدِي
segments.transliteration: wa taruddu biha `alayya ma huwa ahsanu `adatika `indi

translation.en: and through which You may endue me again with the best of Your usual bestowals to me,

segments.transliteration: faqad da`ufat quwwati wa qallat hilati

translation.en: for my power has decreased, my plans have failed,
and my hope in Your creatures have lost

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَبْقَ إِلاَّ رَجَاؤُكَ وَتَوَكُّلِي عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yabqa illa raja'uka wa tawakkuli `alayka

translation.en: and nothing remained except my hope in You and my trust in You.

segments.arabic: وَقُدْرَتُكَ عَلَيَّ يَا رَبِّ أَنْ تَرْحَمَنِي وَتُعَافِيَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa qudratuka `alayya ya rabbi an tarhamani wa tu`afiyani

translation.en: Your power, O my Lord, to have mercy upon me and to grant me wellbeing
is the same as Your power to chastise and afflict me.
O my God, my remembrance of Your conferrals entertains me
and my expectation of Your favors strengthens me.

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ أَخْلُ مِنْ نِعَمِكَ مُنْذُ خَلَقْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa lam akhlu min ni`amika mundhu khalaqtani

translation.en: I have never done without Your favors since You created me.
So, You are my lord, my master,
my shelter, my haven,
my protector, my defender,
the merciful to me, the guarantor of my sustenance,

segments.arabic: وَفِي قَضَائِكَ وَقُدْرَتِكَ كُلُّ مَا أَنَا فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa fi qada'ika wa qudratika kullu ma ana fihi

translation.en: and whatever I am in is under Your decree and authority.
So, O my master and cherisher,

segments.transliteration: fima qadayta wa qaddarta wa hatamta

translation.en: within Your decrees, decisions, and inevitable commands,

segments.arabic: تَعْجِيلُ خَلاَصِي مِمَّا أَنَا فِيهِ جَمِيعِهِ
segments.transliteration: ta`jilu khalasi mimma ana fihi jami`ihi

translation.en: (please) decide on my salvation from all that which I am suffering
and on granting me wellbeing,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي لاَ أَجِدُ لِدَفْعِ ذٰلِكَ أَحَداً غَيْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni la ajidu lidaf`i dhalika ahadan ghayraka

translation.en: for I cannot find any one who can do all that except You
and I trust in none save You.
O Lord of majesty and honor,

segments.arabic: عِنْدَ أَحْسَنِ ظَنِّي بِكَ وَرَجَائِي لَكَ
segments.transliteration: `inda ahsani zanni bika wa raja'i laka

translation.en: (please) act according to the good idea I have about You and according to the hope I have in You,

segments.transliteration: warham tadarru`i wastikanati wa da`fa rukni

translation.en: have mercy on my earnest humbleness, my submission, and the weakness of my support,

segments.arabic: وَٱمْنُنْ بِذٰلِكَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ كُلِّ دَاعٍ دَعَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wamnun bidhalika `alayya wa `ala kulli da`in da`aka

translation.en: and endue me, as well as all suppliants that supplicate You, with all of that.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: May Allah bless Muhammad and his Household.

text.en: Sixth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: `Ali ibn al-Husayn (`a) used to say: After I say these words, I do not care even if all men and jinn support each other against me::

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),

segments.transliteration: wa min allahi wa ila allahi

translation.en: from Allah (I derive power), to Allah (I resort),
in the way of Allah (I proceed),
and on the principles of Allah’s Messenger (I advance),
may Allah bless him and his Household.
O Allah, to You have I submitted myself,
towards You have I turned my face,
to You have I commended my cause,
and with You have I entrusted my affairs.
O Allah, (please) safeguard me with the safeguard of faith

segments.transliteration: min bayni yadayya wa min khalfi

translation.en: before me, behind me,
to my right side, to my left side,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ فَوْقِي وَمِنْ تَحْتِي وَمَا قِبَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa min fawqi wa min tahti wa ma qibali

translation.en: above me, beneath me, and in front of me,
and defend me with Your might and power,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la hawla wa la quwwata illa bika

translation.en: since there is neither might nor power except with You.

text.en: Seventh: The following supplicatory prayer of the Ahl al-Bayt (i.e. the Holy Prophet’s Household) may be said to fend off agonies, horrifying matters, and sways of ruling authorities:

translation.en: O He Who existed before all things!
O He Who composed all things!

segments.transliteration: wa ya baqiyan ba`da kulli shay'in

translation.en: O He Who shall survive after all things!
(Please) bless Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household and…

text.en: You may now submit your requests.
Eighth: Imam Muhammad al-Taqi (`a) is reported to have said: In order to reach at relief (from a trouble), it is recommended to say this supplicatory prayer regularly::

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَكْفِي مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man yakfi min kulli shay'in

translation.en: O He Who saves from all things
but nothing can ever save from Him,
(please) save me from what has distressed me.

text.en: Ninth: Imam Zayn al-`abidin (`a) is reported to have said to his sons: Whenever one of you is inflicted by a misfortune or troubled by a crisis, he should perform the ritual ablution (wudu') as perfectly as possible, offer a two-unit or four-unit prayer, and say the following supplicatory prayer thereafter:

translation.en: O target of all complaints!
O hearer of all confidential talks!
O witness of all gatherings!
O knower of all hidden things!

segments.arabic: وَيَا دَافِعَ مَا يَشَاءُ مِنْ بَلِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ya dafi`a ma yasha'u min baliyyatin

translation.en: O repelling of whatever tribulation You will to repel!
O friend of Abraham!
O talker to Moses!
O chooser of Muhammad,
may Allah bless him and his Household!
I supplicate You with the supplication of one whose indigence is extreme,
whose stratagem has failed,
and whose ability has fallen short;
the supplication of one who is stranger, drowned, distressed;

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَجِدُ لِكَشْفِ مَا هُوَ فِيهِ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: alladhi la yajidu likashfi ma huwa fihi illa anta

translation.en: one who has no one at all to relieve him from what he is suffering save You,
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: No one uses this supplicatory prayer but that Almighty Allah, if He wills, shall relieve him from what he is suffering.
Tenth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: To remove any distress and grief, you may bathe yourself, offer a two-unit prayer, and say the following supplicatory prayer:.

translation.en: O Reliever of distress
and Remover of agony!

segments.transliteration: ya rahmana alddunya wal-akhirati wa rahimahuma

translation.en: O Beneficent and Merciful of this world and the Hereafter,
(please) relieve my distress
and remove my agony.
O Allah Who is the One,
the One and Only, and the eternally besought of all;

segments.transliteration: alladhi lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: Who begets not nor was begotten

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun

translation.en: and there is none comparable unto Him,
(please) protect me, purify me,
and eliminate my tribulation.

text.en: You may then recite ayah al-Kursi, Surah al-Falaq, and Surah al-Nas.
Eleventh: Yazid al-Sa'igh is reported to have said: I asked Imam al-Sadiq (`a) to pray Almighty Allah for our good. He therefore said:
Eleventh: To pray for removing agony, it is reported that one may repeat the following supplicatory prayer one hundred times in a position of prostration:

translation.en: O He Who is ever-living! O He Who is self-subsisting!
O He save Whom there is no god!
In the name of Your mercy do I seek aid;
so, (please) save me from what has distressed me
and do not refer me to myself.

text.en: Twelfth: Imam Musa ibn Ja`far (`a) is reported to have said to Suma`ah: If you have an urgent need to be granted by Almighty Allah, you should say this supplicatory prayer::

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You
in the name of Muhammad and `Ali,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ لَهُمَا عِنْدَكَ شَأْناً مِنَ ٱلشَّأْنِ

translation.en: for they both enjoy a remarkable standing with You
and a significant status;
so, (I beseech You) in the name of this standing
and in the name of this status

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَنْ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa an…

translation.en: (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, and…

text.en: You may now submit your request.
Indeed, on the Resurrection Day, all archangels, missioned prophets, and tested faithful believers will be in need for Muhammad and `Ali, Allah’s peace be upon them and their Household.
[The author of the book] Let me, the poor, refer to this tradition on this occasion:

Ibn Abi’l-Hadid has reported the following incident from Imam `Ali Amir al-Mu'minin (`a): One day, I asked the Holy Prophet (s) to implore God to forgive me. Responding to me, the Holy Prophet (s) stood up, offered a prayer, and raised his hands for supplicating. Listening carefully to him, I heard him saying:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ بِحَقِّ عَلِيٍّ عِنْدَكَ ٱغْفِرْ لِعَلِيٍّ.

translation.en: O Allah, (I beseech You) in the name of `Ali’s standing with You, (please) forgive `Ali.

segments.arabic: فقلت يا رسول الله : ما هذا؟ فقال : أو أحد أكرم منك عليه فأستشفع به اليه

translation.en: Surprisingly, I said to him, “O Allah’s Messenger, what kind of supplication is this?” He (s) answered, “Can I find any other person who is dearer to Allah than you are so that I can beseech Him in his name?”

text.en: Her supplication after ritual Prayer seeking relief from sorrow and grief: It is narrated from Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) that: My mother, Lady Fatima Zahra (s.a.) used to offer a Prayer, which Jibraeel had brought. In the first of its two units Surah Hamd and Surah Qadr is recited and in the second unit, Surah Hamd once and Surah Tauheed a hundred times. After the Prayer, Tasbih of Lady Fatima (s.a.) is recited. After that the knees are exposed and placed on the Prayer mat and the following supplication is recited and after that one’s needs are sought. Then invoke blessings on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) and then supplicate as follows:

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful
O God, I turn to You through the mediation of Muhammad and Progeny of Muhammad
and I adjure by that right of theirs,
whose reality is not known to anyone, except You.

segments.arabic: وَ بِحَقِّ مَنْ حَقُّهٗ عِنْدَكَ عَظِيْمٌ،
segments.transliteration: wa behaqqe man haqqohu i’ndaka a’zeemun,

translation.en: And I adjure by the rights of those,

segments.arabic: وَ بِاَسْمَائِكَ الْحُسْنٰى وَ كَلِمَاتِكَ التَّامَّاتِ الَّتِيْ اَمَرْتَنِيْ اَنْ اَدْعُوَكَ بِهَا،
segments.transliteration: wa be-asmaa-ekal husnaa wa kalemaatekat taammaatil latee amartanee an ad-o’oka behaa,

translation.en: whose right is great in your view and I adjure by your beautiful names and the perfect words through which You have commanded us to supplicate.

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْعَظِيْمِ الَّذِيْ اَمَرْتَ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ - ؑ - اَنْ يَدْعُوَ بِهِ الطَّيْرَ فَاَجَابَتْهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa as-aloka bismekal a’zeemil lazee amarta ibraaheema – a’layhis salaamo – an yad-o’wa behit tayra fa-ajaabatho.

translation.en: And I adjure You by that name through which You commanded Ibrahim Khaleel to call the dead birds.

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِكَ الْعَظِيْمِ الَّذِيْ قُلْتَ لِلنَّارِكُوْنِيْ بَرْدًا وَ سَلَامًا عَلٰى‏ اِبْراهِيْمَ فَكَانَتْ،
segments.transliteration: wa bismekal a’zeemil lazee qulta lin-naare koonee bardan wa salaaman a’laa ibraaheema fakaanat,

translation.en: And by that great name, which You blew on fire and made it cool and safe.

segments.arabic: وَ بِاَحَبِّ اَسْمَائِكَ اِلَيْكَ، وَ اَشْرَفِهَا عِنْدَكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa be-ahabbe asmaaeka elayka, wa ashrafehaa i’ndaka

translation.en: And by your most loved, noble and great names,

segments.arabic: وَ اَعْظَمِهَا لَدَيْكَ وَ اَسْرَعِهَا اِجَابَةً، وَ اَنْجَحِهَا طَلِبَةً،
segments.transliteration: wa a-a’zamehaa ladayka wa asra-e’haa ejaabatan,wa anjahehaa talebatan

translation.en: through which supplication is accepted immediately and needs are fulfilled

segments.arabic: وَ بِمَا اَنْتَ اَهْلُهٗ وَ مُسْتَحِقُّهٗ وَ مُسْتَوْجِبُهٗ.
segments.transliteration: wa bemaa anta ahlohu wa mustahiqqohu wa mustawjebohu.

translation.en: and which You are deserving of and owner of.

segments.arabic: وَ اَتَوَسَّلُ اِلَيْكَ، وَ اَرْغَبُ اِلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa atawassalo elayka, wa arghabo elayka,

translation.en: I seek mediation to You, I am attentive to You and I seek your help.
And I seek bestowal and favor;
and I am a petitioner;
and I am humble
and sincere before You,

segments.arabic: وَ اَخْشَعُ لَكَ وَ اُقِرُّ لَكَ بِسُوْءِ صَنِيْعَتِي،
segments.transliteration: wa akhsha-o’ laka wa oqirro laka be-soo-e sanee-a’tee,

translation.en: and I confess to my evil deeds .
and I insist and persist before You

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْاَلُكَ بِكُتُبِكَ الَّتِيْ اَنْزَلْتَهَا عَلٰى اَنْبِيَائِكَ وَ رُسُلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa as-aloka bekotobekal latee anzaltahaa a’laa anbeyaa-eka wa rosoleka,

translation.en: I adjure by your Books that You revealed on the prophets and messengers
(your blessings and mercy be on them all).

segments.arabic: مِنَ التَّوْرَاةِ وَ الْاِنْجِيْلِ وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيْمِ،
segments.transliteration: menat tawraate wal injeele wal qur-aanil a’zeeme,

translation.en: That is Taurat, Injeel and the great Quran
from its beginning till its end.
As it contains your great name and your beautiful names,

segments.arabic: وَ بِمَا فِيْهَا مِنْ اَسْمَائِكَ الْعُظْمٰى اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa bemaa feehaa min asmaa-ekal u’zmaa ataqarrabo elayka,

translation.en: through which I seek your proximity.

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِهٖ،
segments.transliteration: wa as-aloka an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi,

translation.en: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad and remove their grief and sorrow and through their intercession,

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْ تُفَرِّجَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِهٖ وَ تَجْعَلَ فَرَجِيْ مَقْرُوْنًا بِفَرَجِهِمْ،
segments.transliteration: wa an tofarreja a’n mohammadin wa aalehi wa taj-a’la farajee maqroonan be-farajehim,

translation.en: remove my grief and sorrow as well,

segments.arabic: (وَ تُقَدِّمَهُمْ فِيْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ) وَ تَبْدَاَ بِهِمْ فِيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: (wa toqaddemahum fee kulle khayrin) wa tabda-a behim feehe,

translation.en: and keep them at the forefront in every good,

segments.arabic: وَ تَفْتَحَ اَبْوَابَ السَّمَاءِ لِدُعَائِيْ فِيْ هٰذَا الْيَوْمِ،
segments.transliteration: wa taftaha abwaabas samaa-e le-do-a’a-ee fee haazal yawme,

translation.en: and begin this only with them and today open the gates of heavens for my supplications

segments.arabic: وَ تَاْذَنَ فِيْ هٰذَا الْيَوْمِ وَ هٰذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ بِفَرَجِيْ،
segments.transliteration: wa taazana fee haazal yawme wa haazehil laylate befarajee,

translation.en: and today and tonight command peace for me

segments.arabic: وَ اِعْطَائِيْ سُؤْلِيْ وَ اَمَلِیْ فِيْ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْاٰخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa e-a’taa-ee soalee wa amalee fid dunyaa wal aakherate,

translation.en: and fulfillment of all my demands as
poverty has besieged me
and difficulties surround me.

segments.arabic: وَ سَلَّمَتْنِي الْخَصَاصَةُ وَ اَلْجَاَتْنِيْ الْحَاجَةُ،
segments.transliteration: wa salla-matnil khasaasato wa al-ja-atnil haajato,

translation.en: Needs have turned me over to You and needs have made me a refugee.
Humiliation has targeted
and poverty had overpowered,
and your word is proved true
and mistakes have surrounded me.

segments.arabic: وَ هٰذَا الْوَقْتُ الَّذِيْ وَعَدْتَ اَوْلِيَاءَكَ فِيْهِ الْاِجَابَةَ.
segments.transliteration: wa haazal waqtul lazee wa-a’dta awleyaa-aka feehil ejaabata.

translation.en: This is the time, when You promised acceptance to your friends.
bless Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ امْسَحْ مَا بِيْ بِيَمِيْنِكَ الشَّافِيَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wam sah maa bee be-yameenekash shaafeyate,

translation.en: and remove my difficulties through your curative hands
and look upon me with mercy
and admit me in your wide mercy.

segments.arabic: وَ اَقْبِلْ اِلَيَّ بِوَجْهِكَ الَّذِيْ اِذَا اَقْبَلْتَ بِهٖ عَلٰى اَسِيْرٍ فَكَكْتَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: wa aqbil elayya be-wajhekal lazee ezaa aq-balta behi a’laa aseerin fakaktahu,

translation.en: Turn your towards me, which if it is turned to the prisoner, he is freed.
And if it is turned to the misguided, he becomes guided.

segments.arabic: وَ عَلٰى جَائِزٍ اَدَّيْتَهٗ وَ عَلٰى فَقِیْرٍ اَغْنَيْتَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: wa a’laa jaa-ezin addaytahu wa a’laa faqeerin aghnaytahu,

translation.en: And if it is turned to the perplexed, he is freed from perplexity. And if it is turned to the destitute, he becomes affluent.
If it is turned to the weak, he becomes strong.
If it is turned to the fearful, he is granted security.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُخْلِنِيْ لِقَاءَ عَدُوِّكَ وَ عَدُوِّيْ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa tukhlenee leqaa-a a’duwweka wa a’duwwee,

translation.en: O God, allow my and your enemy to meet me,
O owner of might and majesty.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَعْلَمُ كَيْفَ هُوَ،
segments.transliteration: yaa man laa ya’lamo kayfa howa,

translation.en: O One, whose reality, position

segments.arabic: وَ حَيْثُ هُوَ وَ قُدْرَتَهٗ اِلَّا هُوَ،
segments.transliteration: wa hayso howa wa qudratahu illaa howa,

translation.en: and power is not known to anyone,except Him
O One, who has confined the atmosphere by the sky
and placed the earth on water
and chose the best names for Himself.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ سَمّٰى نَفْسَهٗ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِيْ بِهٖ تَقْضِيْ حَاجَةَ كُلِّ طَالِبٍ يَدْعُوْهُ بِهٖ.
segments.transliteration: yaa man sammaa nafsahu bil-ismil lazee behi taqzee haajata kulle taalebin yad-o’oho behi.

translation.en: O that God, who adopted for Himself every that name through which He fulfills the needs of all those, who pray through them.
I beseech You through the mediation of your names
as I have no intercessor stronger than this.

segments.arabic: وَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ (اَسْاَلُكَ) اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa be-haqqe mohammadin wa aale mohammadin (as-aloka) an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: And I adjure You by the right of Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad that You bless Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad
and fulfill all my pleas.

segments.arabic: وَ تُسْمِعَ مُحَمَّدًا وَ عَلِيًّا وَ فَاطِمَةَ،
segments.transliteration: wa tusme-a’ mohammadan wa a’liyyan wa faatemata,

translation.en: And make my plea reach upto His Eminence Muhammad, Ali Fatima

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَسَنَ وَ الْحُسَيْنَ وَ عَلِيًّا وَ مُحَمَّدًا،
segments.transliteration: wal hasana wal husayna wa a’liyyan wa mohammadan,

translation.en: Hassan Hussain Ali Muhammad
Jafar Musa

segments.arabic: وَ عَلِيًّا وَ مُحَمَّدًا وَ عَلِيًّا،
segments.transliteration: wa a’liyyan wa mohammadan wa a’liyyan,

translation.en: Ali Muhammad Ali

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَسَنَ وَ الْحُجَّةَ - صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ بَرَكَاتُكَ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ – صَوْتِيْ،
segments.transliteration: wal hasana wal hujjata – salawaatoka a’layhim wa barakaatoka wa rahmatoka – sawtee,

translation.en: Hasan and Hujjat Qaim [your blessings and mercy be on them all],

segments.arabic: فَيَشْفَعُوْا لِيْ اِلَيْكَ وَ تُشَفِّعَهُمْ فِيَّ،
segments.transliteration: fayashfa-o’o lee elayka wa toshaf-fe-a’hum fiyya,

translation.en: so that they may be able to recommend my case in your court and You allow them to intercede for me.
And don’t turn me away in despair,
I adjure You by ‘there is no god, except Allah’ and

segments.arabic: وَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa be-haqqe mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: I adjure You by Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلٰی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: Bless Muhammad and his progeny

segments.arabic: وَ افْعَلْ بِيْ ’’كَذَا وَ كَذَا‘‘ يَا كَرِيْمُ.
segments.transliteration: waf a’l bee ‘kazaa wa kazaa’ yaa kareemo.

translation.en: conduct with me ‘as follows’, O merciful God.

text.en: Seeking Forgiveness /Repentance / Isteghfar

Istighfaar means seeking forgiveness of Allah for the sins so far committed and turning repentant unto Allah. Ibn Abbas relates that the was in the company of Imam Ali(as) when a man came and said Mawla, I have transgressed much "Imam told him: ISTIGHFAAR. Another man came and said : Mawla my land has become arid and parched, what shall I do ?. Imam told him ISTIGHFAR. After a few moments another came and said Mawla I am poverty stricken. Nothing I do bearts fruit. Is there any remedy. Imam said: ISTIGHFAR. Then another man came and said : Mawla Allah has not yet blessed me with a child. What should I do. Imam told him ISTIGHAFAR. I asked him : O AMIRUL MUMININ - though the problems were different, but to each of them you advised to pray ISTIGHFAAR. Imam said : Because Allah says in surah Nuh: And I said : seek forgiveness of your Lord. Verily he is ever most forgiving. He will send you abundant rain from the heaven and will help you with wealth and sons, and will make for you gardens and will make for your rivers.
Imam Mohammed Taqi Al Jawad (as) :"Touba" depends upon four things: sincere regrets, verbal "istighfar", deeds and determination never to repeat the sin.
-- Dua'as by Imam Sajjad (as)from Sahifa e Kamela --

<ref=2:31>His Supplication in Repentance -31</ref>
<ref=2:38>His Supplication in Asking Pardon -38</ref>
<ref=2:39>His Supplication in Seeking Pardon and Mercy 39</ref>
<ref=3:1345>Istighfaar Mojiza Asa from Imam Ali(as)</ref>
-- Duas from 'Imam Taqi (as)' --
<ref=3:1319>Munajat True Repentance</ref>
<ref=3:1323>Munajat Accepting Repentance</ref>
Namaz-e-Isteghfar - 1

This is four rakat prayer. In the first rakat after Surah Hamd recite Ayatul Kursi once. In the second rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Tawheed once. In the third rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Falaq once. In the fourth rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Naas once. After concluding the prayer recite the Isteghfar ten times.
The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) said:
If one recites this prayer on Saturday before noon the Almighty Allah forgives all his sins.
Namaz-e-Isteghfar - 2
The easiest Namaz-e-Isteghfar is two rakats. In each rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Tawheed sixty times. Insha Allah the sins would be forgiven.
Namaz-e-Isteghfar - 3
The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) said:

If one desires that his sins are forgiven he should pray two rakat Namaz on Tuesday eve. In the first rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Qadr once and in the second rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Tawheed seven times. After concluding the prayer recite Isteghfar. Insha Allah the Almighty Allah would forgive the sins.
Namaz-e-Isteghfar - 4
The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) said:

If one recites 10 rakats prayer on Tuesday in the following way that in every rakat after Surah Hamd he recites Ayatul Kursi once and Surah Tawheed seven times; the Almighty Allah shall forgive the sins of all his life.
Namaz-e-Isteghfar - 5

Recite two rakats prayer. In the first rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Qadr thrice and in the second rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Zilzaal thrice. After concluding the prayer recite 100 times: Astaghfirullaah Rabbi wa atoobo ilaihe.
Namaz-e-Tawbah
The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) emerged from his house on Sunday the 2nd of Zilqad and said:
O people! Who among you intends to perform Tawbah?
The people replied: All of us would like to do Tawbah.
The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) said:

Perform the Ghusl (bath) and Wuzu (ablution) and recite four rakats prayer. In each rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Tawheed thrice and Surah Falaq and Surah Naas once each and after the prayer do Isteghfar and then say: Laa hawla wa laa quwwata illa billaahil a'liyyil a'zeem. Then say: Yaa A'zeezo yaa ghaffooro ighfirli zunoobi wa zunooba Jamee'il mo-mineena wal mo-minaate. Fa innahu laa yaghfiro illa ant.
And the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said:

No servant of my Ummat performs this prayer that a caller does not calls out from the sky: O slave of Allah! This deed has been elevated and your repentance (Tawbah) has been accepted and your sins are forgiven.
An angel will call out beneath the heavens: O slave of Allah! Congratulations to you and your family members.

An angel would call out: Your enemy would be satisfied with you on the day of Judgment. Another angel would call out: O slave of Allah! You would leave this world with faith. You would not be arrested. Your grave shall be expansive and illuminated.

Another angel would call out: O slave of Allah! Your parents are happy with you though they were dissatisfied with you before. Your parents and your descendants shall get salvation and there shall be increase in the livelihood in the world and the hereafter.

Hazrat Jibraeel (a.s.) would call out: At the time of death I would come with the Angel of death and would be kind to you and you shall not have any problem. Your body would not be pained at the time the soul is taken out.
The people asked: O Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.), how should one perform this if one desires to perform it in any other month? The Prophet (s.a.) replied:
In the same way with the merits.
And said: Jibraeel has taught me these words on the night of ascension (Shab-e-Me'raj).
Other Duas of Isteghfar :
DUA'A 16 - O Lord, I have wronged myself. So forgive me. Verily save You there is no one who can protect from the consequences of sinning.

translation.en: Third:

text.en: DUA'A 17

O Allah, I seek forgiveness for every sin, I committed, about which, of course, You know inside and out, from the beginning to the end of my life, whether committed deliberately or intentionally, few or many, obscure or manifest, old or new, secretly carried out or openly done; and for whatever wrong I have done I turn repentant unto You and beseech You to bless Muhammad and the children of Muhammad and forgive all my unjust acts I did to wrong the people (because they have rights which I have to recognize and fulfill) but You have full authority to forgive those wrongdoings whenever and howsoever You wish, O the most merciful.

allahumma innee astaghfiruka likulli d'ambin jaraa bihee i'lmuka fiyya wa a'layya ilaa aakhiri u'mree bi-jamee-i d'unoobee li-awwalihaa wa aakhirihaa wa a'madihaa wa khat a-ihaa wa qaleelihaa wa katheerihaa wa daqeeqihaa wa jaleelihaa wa qadeemihaa wa h'adeethihaa wa sirrihaa wa a'laaniyatihaa wa jamee-i maa anaa mud'nibuhoo wa atoobu ilayka wa as-aluka an tus'alliya a'laa muh'ammadin wa aali muh'ammadin wa an taghfira lee jamee-a, maa ah's'aytu mim maz'aalimil i'baadi qibalee fa-inna li-ibaadika a'layya h'uqooqan wa anaa murtahinum bihaa taghfiruhaa kayfa shi-ta wa annaa shia-ta yaa arh'amar raah'imeen
Evil repelling DuasBaqiyatus Salehaat.
Chap 9

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, in Allah (I trust),
and on Allah do I rely.

segments.arabic: إِنَّهُ مَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
segments.transliteration: innahu man yatawakkal ʿala allahi fahuwa hasbuhu

translation.en: Verily, whoever trusts in Allah, He is sufficient for him.
Surely, Allah attains His purpose.

segments.arabic: قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدْراً
segments.transliteration: qad jaʿala allahu likulli shay'in qadran

translation.en: Allah indeed has appointed a measure for everything.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْنِي فِي كَنَفِكَ وَفِي جِوَارِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ijʿalni fi kanafika wa fi jiwarika

translation.en: O Allah, (please) put me under Your shade and in Your vicinity

segments.transliteration: wajʿalni fi amanika wa fi manʿika

translation.en: and put me under Your security and in Your shield.
O Allah, (please) entertain my loneliness,
secure my dread,
and help me against my being alone.
I pray for Your protection the perfect Words of Allah
and all of His excellent names totally
against the evil of poisonous things and the pestles,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli ʿaynin lammatin

translation.en: against the evil of all evil eyes,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri hasidin idha hasada

translation.en: and against the evil of the envious when he envies.
O black, leaping fleas

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُبَالِي غَلَقاً وَلاَ بَاباً
segments.transliteration: alladhi la yubali ghalaqan wa la baban

translation.en: that care for neither a lock nor a door,
I adjure you in the name of the Mother of the Book
not to annoy my companions and me
until night terminates
and morning comes carrying what it carries.
I pray the protection of the Lord of Daniel and the well (in which Daniel was thrown with beasts)
against all strong, ravenous lions.
I adjure you by the adjuration of Allah,

segments.arabic: وَعَزِيمَةِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ʿazimati muhammadin salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: the adjuration of Muhammad, Allah's blessings be upon him and his Household,
the adjuration of Solomon the son of David,

segments.arabic: وَعَزِيمَةِ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa ʿazimati amiri almu'minina ʿaliyyi ibni abi talibin ʿalayhi alssalamu

translation.en: the adjuration of the Commander of the Faithful `Ali the son of Abi-Talib, peace be upon him,

segments.arabic: وَٱلأَئِمَّةِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ
segments.transliteration: wal-a'immati alttahirina ʿalayhim alssalamu min baʿdihi

translation.en: and the adjuration of the immaculate Imams after him, peace be upon them.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظيِمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power save with Allah the All-high and All-great.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa an tunjiyani min hadha alghammi

translation.en: and to save me from this distress.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O He Who is Ever-living; O He Who is Self-subsisting,
in the name of Your mercy I pray for Your aid; so, (please) come to my aid,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلىٰ نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: wa la takilni ila nafsi tarfata ʿaynin abadan

translation.en: do not leave me with myself even for a winking of an eye,
and set aright my entire affair.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
In the Name of Allah (I begin) and in Allah (I put my trust).
I shut the mouths of jinn, human beings,
devils, sorcerers, demons,
both jinn and human beings,
rulers, and their protégés
in the name of Allah the Almighty and Mightiest,
in the name of Allah the Great and Greatest,
and in the name of Allah that is evident, immanent,
hoarded, and stored,
and by which Allah has established the heavens and the earth
and then prevailed on the Throne.
"In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.transliteration: wa waqaʿa alqawlu ʿalayhim bima zalamu

translation.en: And the word shall come to pass against them because they were unjust,
so they shall not speak."

segments.transliteration: qala ikhsa'u fiha wa la tukallimuni

translation.en: "He shall say: Go away into it and speak not to Me."
"And the faces shall be humbled before the Living, the Self-subsistent Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa qad khaba man hamala zulman

translation.en: and he who bears iniquity is indeed in a failure."
"And the voices shall be low before the Beneficent Allah
so that you shall not hear aught but a soft sound."

segments.transliteration: wa jaʿalna ʿala qulubihim akinnatan an yafqahuhu

translation.en: "And We have cast veils over their hearts lest they understand it
and a heaviness into their ears."

segments.transliteration: wa idha dhakarta rabbaka fi alqur'ani wahdahu

translation.en: "And when you mention your Lord alone in the Qur'an
they turn their backs in aversion."
"And when you recite the Qur'an,

segments.arabic: جَعَلْنَا بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لاَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: jaʿalna baynaka wa bayna alladhina la yu'minuna bilakhirati

translation.en: We place between you and those who do not believe in the hereafter
a hidden barrier."

segments.transliteration: wa jaʿalna min bayni aydihim saddan

translation.en: "And We have made before them a barrier
and a barrier behind them,
then We have covered them over so that they do not see."
"On that day, We will set a seal upon their mouths,
and their hands shall speak to Us."
"So, they shall not speak."

segments.transliteration: law anfaqta ma fi al-ardi jamiʿan

translation.en: "Had you spent all that is in the earth,
you could not have united their hearts,
but Allah united them.
Surely, He is Mighty, Wise."

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu ʿala muhammadin wa alihi alttahirina

translation.en: May Allah bless Muhammad and his immaculate Household.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Creator of the creation!
O Amplifying of sustenance!
O Splitter of grains!
O Originator of spirits!
O Reviver of the dead!
O Deadener of the living!
O constantly Firm!
O Bringer forth of plants!
(Please) do to me what befits You to do,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنَا أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la tafʿal bi ma ana ahluhu

translation.en: but do not do to me what I deserve,

segments.transliteration: wa anta ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

translation.en: for You are the worthiest to be feared and the worthiest to forgive.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَمْ مِنْ عَدُوٍّ شَحَذَ لِي ظُبَةَ مُدْيَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi kam min ʿaduwwin shahadha li zubata mudyatihi

translation.en: O my God, too many are the enemies who honed their daggers' edge against me,
sharpened the heads of their weapons against me,
mixed for me their deadly poisons,

segments.transliteration: wa lam tanam ʿanni ʿaynu hirasatihi

translation.en: and kept a sleepless eye on me,

segments.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَيْتَ ضَعْفِي عَنِ ٱحْتِمَالِ ٱلْفَوَادِحِ
segments.transliteration: falamma ra'ayta daʿfi an ihtimali alfawadihi

translation.en: but when You considered that I am too weak to bear hardships
and I am too powerless to bear the accumulating cataclysms,

segments.transliteration: sarafta dhalika ʿanni bihawlika wa quwwatika

translation.en: You warded off all that from me through Your might and power,

segments.transliteration: la bihawlin minni wa la quwwatin

translation.en: but not through my might or power.

segments.arabic: فَأَلْقَيْتَهُ فِي ٱلْحَفِيرِ ٱلَّذِي ٱحْتَفَرَهُ لِي
segments.transliteration: fa'alqaytahu fi alhafiri alladhi ihtafarahu li

translation.en: You have thus thrown him in the hole, which he had dug for me,
making him lose any hope he had in this world
and move away from what he had expected in the Hereafter.
So, all praise be to you for that;
praise that is comparable to what You deserve, O my master.
So, O Allah, (please) grasp him by Your almightiness,
notch his sharpness against me with Your omnipotence,
and cause him to be engaged with what will inflict him
and to be too weak to face his rivals.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa aʿdini ʿalayhi ʿadwan hadiratan

translation.en: O Allah, (please) help me against his animosity with such help that is in progress
and due to which my rage will be healed
and my anger will protect me against him.
O Allah, (please) connect my prayer with Your response,
attach my complaint to the reply that changes my state,

segments.arabic: وَعَرِّفْهُ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ مَا أَوْعَدْتَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa ʿarrifhu ʿamma qalilin ma awʿadta alzzalimina

translation.en: show him very soon and practically what You have prepared threateningly for the wrongdoers,

segments.arabic: وَعَرِّفْنِي مَا وَعَدْتَ فِي إِجَابَةِ ٱلْمُضْطَرِّينَ
segments.transliteration: wa ʿarrifni ma waʿadta fi ijabati almudtarrina

translation.en: and show me very soon and practically how You respond to the distressed ones.
Verily, You are the Lord of great favor
and generous conferral.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
In the Name of Allah.

segments.arabic: إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمٰنِ مِنْكَ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَقِيّاً
segments.transliteration: inni aʿudhu bilrrahmani minka in kunta taqiyyan

translation.en: Surely, I seek refuge in the Beneficent Allah from you, if you are pious
or impious.
I seek Allah the All-hearing and All-seeing
to guard me against your hearing and your sight.
You have authority neither over me,
nor over my hearing,
nor over my sight,
nor over my hair,
nor over my skin,
nor over my flesh,
nor over my blood,
nor over my brain,
nor over my veins,
nor over my bones,
nor over my property,

segments.transliteration: wa la ʿala ma razaqani rabbi

translation.en: nor over what my Lord has provided me.

segments.transliteration: satartu bayni wa baynaka bisitri alnnubuwwati

translation.en: I block between you and me with the blockage of prophecy
with which the prophets of Allah blocked
against the sways of the tyrants and the oppressive rules.
Gabriel is to my right side,
Michael to my left side,
Seraph to my backside,

segments.arabic: وَمُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَمَامِي
segments.transliteration: wa muhammadun salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi amami

translation.en: Muhammad, Allah's blessings be upon him and his Household, to my front side,
and Allah is overseeing me
to prevent you from me
and prevent Satan from me.
O Allah, let not his intolerance overcome Your forbearance
lest he may provoke and belittle me.
O Allah, to You do I resort.
O Light! O Demonstrative Argument!
O Evident! O Brilliant!
O Lord, (please) save me from all evils
and vicissitudes of times,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ ٱلنَّجَاةَ يَوْمَ يُنْفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka alnnajata yawma yunfakhu fi alssuri

translation.en: and I beseech You for redemption on the day when the Trumpet will be blown.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Mighty of all might in His almightiness!

segments.arabic: مَا أَعَزَّ عَزِيزَ ٱلْعِزِّ فِي عِزِّهِ
segments.transliteration: ma aʿazza ʿaziza alʿizzi fi ʿizzihi

translation.en: How mighty the mighty of all might in His almightiness is!
O Mighty, (please) make me mighty in the name of Your almightiness,
aide me with Your support,
ward off from me the inspirations of devils,
defend me with Your defense,
protect me with Your making,
and make me of the best of Your creatures.
O One! O One and Only!
O Unique! O eternally besought of all.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O my means in my ordeals!
O my aide in my agonies!
O my entertainment in my loneliness!
(Please) guard me with Your eye that never sleeps
and embrace me with Your support that is invincible.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O owner of all selves!
O defeater of the allies!
O opener of all doors!
O creator of all causes!
(Please) create for us a cause
that we cannot find anywhere else,
in the name of 'There is no god but Allah.
Muhammad is the messenger of Allah.'

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayhi wa ʿala alihi ajmaʿina

translation.en: May Allah's blessings be upon him and all of the members of his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَنْ أَوَىٰ إِلَىٰ مَأْوَىًٰ فَأَنْتَ مَأْوَايَ
segments.transliteration: ma man awa ila ma'wan fa'anta ma'waya

translation.en: O Allah, if someone may resort to a shelter, then my shelter is You.

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ لَجَأَ إِلىٰ مَلْجإٍ فَأَنْتَ مَلْجَئِي
segments.transliteration: wa man laja'a ila malja'in fa'anta malja'i

translation.en: If someone may seek refuge in an asylum, they my asylum is You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
listen to my call,
respond to my prayer,
decide my final return and abode to be with You,
and guard me, when I am afflicted by an ordeal,
against failure in the trial
and against the influence of Satan,

segments.arabic: بِعَظَمَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ يَشُوبُهَا وَلَعُ نَفْسٍ بِتَفْتِينٍ
segments.transliteration: biʿazamatika allati la yashubuha walaʿu nafsin bitaftinin

translation.en: [please do it] in the name of Your greatness that is admixed with neither infatuating fondness
nor assumed and transitory apparition

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَلُمُّ بِهَا فَرَحٌ حَتَّىٰ تَقْلِبَنِي إِلَيْكَ بِإِرَادَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yalummu biha farahun hatta taqlibani ilayka bi'iradatika

translation.en: and is not charmed by a joyful situation, until You decide to take me to You by Your will
while I am neither accused, suspect,

segments.transliteration: wa la murabin wa la murtabin

translation.en: suspicious, nor doubtful.
Verily, You are the most merciful of all those who show mercy.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
There is no god but Allah.
In Him do I put my trust
and He is the Lord of the Great Throne.
What Allah wills shall come to pass,

segments.transliteration: wa ma lam yasha' lam yakun

translation.en: but what He does not will shall never come to pass.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu anna allaha ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: I bear witness that Allah has power over all things

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ اللَّهَ قَدْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْماً
segments.transliteration: wa anna allaha qad ahata bikulli shay'in ʿilman

translation.en: and Allah has encompassed all things in His knowledge.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni aʿudhu bika min sharri nafsi

translation.en: O Allah, I pray Your protection against the evils of my self

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli dabbatin anta akhidhun binasiyatiha

translation.en: and against the evil of every living creature that You hold by its forelock.
Surely, my Lord is on the right path.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
In the Name of Allah; the best of all names.
In the Name of Allah; the Lord of the earth and the heavens.

segments.arabic: بِسمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَضُرُّ مَعَ ٱسْمِهِ سَمٌّ وَلاَ دَاءٌ
segments.transliteration: bismillahi alladhi la yadurru maʿa ismihi sammun wa la da'un

translation.en: In the Name of Allah with Whose Name, neither poison nor malady can harm.
In the Name of Allah, I begin my day
and in Allah, I put my trust.
In the Name of Allah on my heart and my self.
In the Name of Allah on my faith and my intellect.
In the Name of Allah on my family members and my property.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ عَلَىٰ مَا أَعْطَانِي رَبِّي

translation.en: In the Name of Allah on what Allah has given me.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَضُرُّ مَعَ ٱسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ
segments.transliteration: bismillahi alladhi la yadurr maʿa ismihi shay'un

translation.en: In the Name of Allah with Whose Name nothing can ever harm

segments.transliteration: fi al-ardi wa la fi alssama'i

translation.en: neither in the earth nor in the heavens,
and He is the All-hearing, the All-knowing.
Allah, Allah is my Lord.
I do not associate any thing with Him.
Allah is the Most Great.

segments.transliteration: allahu akbaru wa aʿazzu wa ajallu

translation.en: Allah is greater, mightier, and more majestic
than what I fear and what I am afraid of.
Strong is one who is in Your vicinity,
majestic is the praise of You,
and there is no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni aʿudhu bika min sharri nafsi

translation.en: O Allah, I pray Your protection against the evil of my self,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli sultanin shadidin

translation.en: the evil of all stern rulers,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli shaytanin maridin

translation.en: the evil of all rebellious devils,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli jabbarin ʿanidin

translation.en: the evil of all obstinate tyrants,
the evil of all misfortunate decrees,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa min kulli dabbatin anta akhidhun binasiyatiha

translation.en: and [the evil of] all living creatures that You grasp from the forelock.
Verily, You are on a straight path

segments.transliteration: wa anta ʿala kulli shay'in hafizun

translation.en: and You are the custodian over all things.

segments.arabic: «إِنَّ وَ لِيِّيَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي نَزَّلَ ٱلْكِتَابَ
segments.transliteration: inn waliyyiya allahu alladhi nazzala alkitaba

translation.en: "Surely, my guardian is Allah Who revealed the Book
and He keeps the righteous people under His custody."
"But if they turn back, then say, 'Allah is sufficient for me.
There is no god but He.
On Him do I rely
and He is the Lord of mighty power.'"
O Allah, I pray Your protection
lest that I may be needy while Your riches are there for me,
I may be led astray while Your guidance is there for me,
I may be humiliated while Your honoring is there for me,
I may be subjugated while Your absolute authority is there for me,
or I may be persecuted while the entire affair is Yours.
O Allah, I pray Your protection
lest I may say false things,
commit wickedness,
or be seduced to exceed Your limits.
In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Sufficient to me is Allah.
I put my trust in Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ أُمُورِي كُلِّهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka khayra umuri kulliha

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You for success in all of my affairs

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خِزْيِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ ٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min khizyi alddunya wa ʿadhabi al-akhirati

translation.en: and I pray Your protection against disgrace in this world and chastisement in the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ إِذَا ٱسْتَعَذْتُ بِهِ أَعَاذَنِي
segments.transliteration: ya man idha istaʿadhtu bihi aʿadhani

translation.en: O He Who unquestionably protects me whenever I pray Him for protection,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا ٱسْتَجَرْتُ بِهِ عِنْدَ ٱلشَّدَائِدِ أَجَارَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa idha istajartu bihi ʿinda alshshada'idi ajarani

translation.en: Who unquestionably shelters me whenever I pray for His shelter against hardships,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا ٱسْتَغَثْتُ بِهِ عِنْدَ ٱلنَّوَائِبِ أَغَاثَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa idha istaghathtu bihi ʿinda alnnawa'ibi aghathani

translation.en: Who unquestionably aids me whenever I pray for His aid at calamities,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا ٱسْتَنْصَرْتُ بِهِ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّي نَصَرَنِي وَأَعَانَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa idha istansartu bihi ʿala ʿaduwwi nasarani wa aʿanani

translation.en: and Who unquestionably supports and assists me whenever I pray for His support against my enemy.
Towards You is the flight
and You are the most trustful;
so, (please) subdue whoever intends evil to me
and overcome whoever plots against me.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ قَالَ «إِنْ يَنْصُرْكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فَلاَ غَالِبَ لَكُمْ.»
segments.transliteration: ya man qala in yansurkum allahu fala ghaliba lakum

translation.en: O He Who has said, "If Allah assists you, then there is none that can overcome you."

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ نَجَّىٰ نُوحاً مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: ya man najja nuhan min alqawmi alzzalimina

translation.en: O He Who has saved Noah from the oppressing people!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ نَجَّىٰ لُوطاً مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلْفَاسِقِينَ
segments.transliteration: ya man najja lutan min alqawmi alfasiqina

translation.en: O He Who has saved Lot from the wicked people!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ نَجَّىٰ هُوداً مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلْعَادِينَ
segments.transliteration: ya man najja hudan min alqawmi alʿadina

translation.en: O He Who has saved Hud from the transgressing people!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ نَجَّىٰ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلْكَافِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: ya man najja muhammadan salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi min alqawmi alkafirina

translation.en: O He Who has saved Muhammad, Allah's blessings be upon him and his Household, from the disbelieving people!
(Please) save me from my and Your enemies,
in the name of Your Names; O All-beneficent, O All-merciful.

segments.arabic: لاَ سَبِيلَ لَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَنْ تَعَوَّذَ بِٱلْقُرْآنِ
segments.transliteration: la sabila lahum ʿala man taʿawwadha bilqur'ani

translation.en: They have no way to harm whoever prays the protection of the Qur'an
and prays the shelter of You in the name of Your Names: the All-merciful and the All-beneficent.
"The All-beneficent is firmly established on the throne (of authority)."
"Truly, strong is the Grip (and Power) of thy Lord.
It is He Who creates from the very beginning, and He can restore (life),
and He is the Oft-Forgiving, Full of Loving-Kindness,
Lord of the Throne of Glory,
and Doer (without let) of all that He intends."
"But if they turn away, then say: 'Allah suffices me:
there is no god but He.:
On Him is my trust,
and He the Lord of the Throne (of Glory) Supreme.'"

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَمُوتُ
segments.transliteration: tawakkaltu ʿala alhayyi alladhi la yamutu

translation.en: I put my trust in the ever-living Lord Who never dies.
I pray the immunity of the Lord of almightiness and omnipotence.
I pray the aid of the Lord of grandeur and kingdom.
O my Master, I surrender to You; so, (please) do not disappoint me,
I put my trust in You; so, (please) do not thwart me,

segments.arabic: وَلَجَأْتُ إِلَىٰ ظِلِّكَ ٱلْبَسِيطِ فَلاَ تَطْرَحْنِي
segments.transliteration: wa laja'tu ila zillika albasiti fala tatrahni

translation.en: and to Your extensive shadow do I resort; so, (please) do not throw me away.
You are the utmost purpose and to You are all flights made.

segments.transliteration: taʿlamu ma ukhfi wa ma uʿlinu

translation.en: You know whatever I hide and whatever I do openly.

segments.arabic: وَتَعْلَمُ خَائِنَةَ ٱلأَعْيُنِ وَمَا تُخْفِي ٱلصُّدُورُ
segments.transliteration: wa taʿlamu kha'inata al-aʿyuni wa ma tukhfi alssuduru

translation.en: You know the stealthy looks of eyes and what is concealed in breasts.
So, O Allah, (please) withhold the hands of the transgressors against me,
including all jinn and all human beings,
heal me, and grant me wellbeing,
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!
The Creator is greater than the creatures.
The Sustaining Lord is more liberal than the sustained beings.
The awning over fire of Allah
in outstretched columns
will frustrate the plots of the hearts of the rebellious
and will thwart the trickeries of the envious
in the name of the Oaths, the Decrees,
the Preserved Tablet,
the Hanged Down Screen,
and the Throne of our Great Lord.
I seek the screen, the covering,
the shelter, the safeguard,

segments.transliteration: wa bita ha wa bita' sin mim

translation.en: 'ta-ha,' 'ta'-sin-mim,'

segments.transliteration: wa bita sin wa biqaf walqur'ani almajidi

translation.en: 'ta-sin,' 'qaf,' 'the Glorious Qur'an,'

segments.transliteration: wa innahu laqasamun law taʿlamuna ʿazimun

translation.en: and 'And most surely, it is a very great oath if you only knew.'
Allah is my guardian, and the most excellent protector is He.
O All-compassionate! O All-merciful!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ ذُنُوبِي لَمْ يَبْقَ لَهَا إِلاَّ رَجَاءُ عَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna dhunubi lam yabqa laha illa raja'u ʿafwika

translation.en: O Allah, nothing has indeed left for my sins except my hope for You pardon

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ آلَةَ ٱلْحِرْمَانِ بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa qad qaddamtu alata alhirmani bayna yadayya

translation.en: although I have done things due to which I deserve deprivation of Your pardon.
Therefore, I beseech You for what I do not deserve,
I seek from You what I do not merit,

segments.transliteration: wa atadarraʿu ilayka bima la asta'hiluhu

translation.en: and I implore You for what I do not earn.
My situation is not concealed from You

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ خَفِيَ عَلَىٰ ٱلنَّاسِ كُنْهُ مَعْرِفَةِ أَمْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa in khafiya ʿala alnnasi kunhu maʿrifati amri

translation.en: although the actual knowledge of my manners is hidden from people.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كَانَ رِزْقِي فِي ٱلسَّمَاءِ فَأَهْبِطْهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma in kana rizqi fi alssama'i fa'ahbithu

translation.en: O Allah, if my sustenance in the sky, then (please) send it down to me,

segments.transliteration: wa in kana fi al-ardi fa'azhirhu

translation.en: if it is in the earth, then (please) show it to me,
if it is far off, then (please) draw it near me,
if it is near, then (please) make it easy for me to reach it,
and if it is little, then (please) multiply it for me
and grant me its blessings.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ إِبْلِيسَ عَبْدٌ مِنْ عَبِيدِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna iblisa ʿabdun min ʿabidika

translation.en: O Allah, Iblis is not but one of Your servants;
he can see me from whence I cannot see him,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ تَرَاهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ يَرَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anta tarahu min haythu la yaraka

translation.en: but You can see him from whence he cannot see You.

segments.transliteration: wa anta aqwa ʿala amrihi kullihi

translation.en: While You have full power over all of his deeds,

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ لاَ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ شَيْءٍ مِنْ أَمْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa la yaqwa ʿala shay'in min amrika

translation.en: he has no power over any of Your decrees.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَأَنَا أَسْتَعِينُ بِكَ عَلَيْهِ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fa'ana astaʿinu bika ʿalayhi ya rabbi

translation.en: So, O Allah, I pray Your help against him, O Lord,
for I have no strength to challenge him

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ لِي عَلَيْهِ إِلاَّ بِكَ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata li ʿalayhi illa bika ya rabbi

translation.en: and I have neither might nor power against him except through You, O my Lord.
O Allah, if he intends evil to me, then (please) deter him,
if he plots against me, then (please) plot against him,
save me from his evils,
and make his trickery to be hanged to his own neck,
in the name of Your mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu ʿala muhammadin wa alihi alttahirina

translation.en: May Allah bless Muhammad and his Immaculate Household.

text.en: Short Powerful Duas.
Duas 1-5
Duas 6-18
Baqiyatusalehat
1.Dua Jam'e (complete & concise)

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلٰي كُلِّ نِعْمَةٍ وَ اَسْتَغْفِرُالله مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ وَ اَسْئَلُهُ مِنْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَ أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَرٍّ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahii ‘ala kulli ne'matin wa astaghfirullaha min kulli zambin,wa asaluhu min kulli khairin,wa a’udhu billahi min kulli sharrin

translation.en: Praise be to Allah for all the blessings. Oh Allah, Forgive all our sins, give us all that is good and keep us away from all that is bad

text.en: 2.Small but Complete Dua:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اِنِّي اَسْأَلُكَ الْأَمْنَ وَالْإِيْمَانَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَة
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni asaluka wal amna wal eemaana fid-dunya wal aakhera

translation.en: O Allah I ask of You peace & faith in this world and in the hereafter

text.en: 3. Dua ne'mul badal

segments.arabic: اِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلِيْهِ راجِعُون، اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِى فَرَجاً وَ مَخْرَجًا وَ الرْزُقْنِىْ خَيْرَ مِنْ حَيْثُ اَحْتَسِبُ وَ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا اَحْتَسِبُ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilaihi raji’oon, allahummaj’alni farajan wa makhrajan war zuqni khaira min haithu ahtasibu wa min haithu la ahtasib , bi haqqi Muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: We are from Allah & will return to Him. Oh Allah, let my affairs be free from care & make them profitable & give me means of livelihood from my share & from where I have no expectation. For the sake of Muhammad and the Progeny of Muhammad

text.en: 4.Three short duas from Imam Taqi al Jawad علیه السلام

segments.arabic: اللهُ اللهُ رَبِّي اَلرَّحْمَنُ الرَّحِيمُ لَا اُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْءً
segments.transliteration: Allaahu, Allaahu, Rabbi Ar-Rahmanur-Raheemu, Laa ushriku bihi shay'aa

translation.en: Allah, Allah, my Lord, the Most Gracious [and] the Most Merciful I do not associate anything with Him

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَّكْفِىْ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَلَا يَكْفِى مِنْهُ شَيْءٌ اِكْفِنِي مَآ أَهَمَّنِي مِمَّا اَنَا فِيْهِ
segments.transliteration: Yaa may-yakfee min kulli shayin walaa yakfee minhu shayun ikfinee maa ahammanee mimaa anaa feehi

translation.en: O He who is sufficient from all things but nothing is sufficient from Him. Be sufficient for me in what worries me in the state I am

segments.arabic: َلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي خَلَقَنَا مِنْ نُورِهِ بِيَدِهِ وَاسْتَفَانَا مِنْ(م) بَرِيَّتِهِ وَجَعَلَنَا اُمَنَاهُ عَلٰى خَلْقِهِ وَ وَحْيِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillaahil-ladhee khalaqanaa min-noorihee biyadihi wastafaanaa mim bariyyatihi wajaʿlanaa umanaahu ʿalaa khalqihee wa-wahyihi

translation.en: Praise be to Allah who created us from His Light with His hand and dignified us over His creatures, and made us trustees of His creation and His revelation.

text.en: 5. Four simple effective quranic duas

segments.arabic: وَأُفَوِّضُ أَمْرِي إِلَى اللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بَصِيرٌ بِالْعِبَادِ
segments.transliteration: Wa ufawwidhu amree ilallaah inallaaha baseerun bil ‘ibad

translation.en: So you shall remember what I say to you, and I entrust my affair to Allah, Surely Allah sees the servants. [Sura Ghafir v 44)

segments.arabic: مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ ۚ

translation.en: It is as Allah has pleased, there is no power save in Allah [Sura Kahf, Verse 39]

segments.arabic: لَّا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: Laa ilaaha ilaa anta subhanaka innee kuntu minadhaalimeen

translation.en: There is no god but Thou, glory be to Thee; surely I am of those who make themselves to suffer loss.Sura 21: 87
Allah is sufficient for us and most excellent is the Protector.3: 173

segments.arabic:
عبدُكَ بِفَنكَ ,
سائلُكَ بِفَنكَ ,
مسكينُكَ بِفَنكَ ,
فقيرُكَ بِفَنكَ .
segments.transliteration: ʿAbduka bi-fannika Sāʾiluka bi-fannika Miskīnuka bi-fannika Faqīruka bi-fannika

translation.en: Your servant/ slave , Your beseecher , Your needy Your poor is Coming to your door /grace

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اِنِّي اَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةِ وَالشُّكْرَ الْعَافِيَةِ

translation.en: O Allah I ask from You well-being, and to be grateful for the well-being.

segments.arabic: لَا اِلَهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الْمَلِكُ الْحَقُّ الْمُبِينُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaaha illallah-ul malik-ul haqq-ul mubeenu

translation.en: There is no god, except Allah, the Ruler, the Real, the Manifest

segments.arabic: اُعِيْذُ نَفْسِيْ بِرَبِّ الْاَرْضِ وَرَبِّ السَّمَاءِ اُعِيْذُ نَفْسِيْ بِالَّذِيْ لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ دَاءٌ اُعِيْذُ نَفْسِيْ بِالَّذِيْ اسْمُهُ بَرَكَةٌ وَشِفَاءٌ.
segments.transliteration: Uʿidhoo nafsee birabbil-ardhi wa rabbis-samaa' Uʿidhoo nafsee billadhee laa yadhurru maʿa-smihi daa' Uʿidhoo nafsee billadhee-smuhu barakatun washifaa'

translation.en: I seek protection for my soul in the Lord of the earth and the Lord of the heavens I seek protection for my soul in the One in whose name no sickness can hurt I seek protection for my soul in the One whose name is Blessed and a Cure.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى فَاطِمَةَ وَاِبَيهَا وَبَعْلِهَا وَبَنِيهَا وَسِرِّ الْمُسْتَوْدِعِ فِيهَا بِعَدَدِ مَا أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ‘alaa Fatimata wa abeeha wa b’alihaa wa baneehaa wa sirr-il mustawdi’i feeha bi ‘adadi maa ahata bihi ‘ilmuk

translation.en: O Allah send blessings on Fatima and her father, her husband and her sons, and by the secret installed in her, which only is in Your knowledge

segments.arabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ أَغْلَالًا فَهِيَ إِلَى الْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
segments.transliteration: Inna Ja'alna fee a'naqihim aghlaa lan fa hiya ilal adhqaani fahum muqmahoon

translation.en: Verily we have put on their necks iron collars reaching upto their chins so that their heads are raised up. [Sura Yasin, Verse 8]

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِن بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَاهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: Wa ja ‘alna mim bayne Aide him saddawn min khal fe him saddan fa aghshayna hum fa hum la yubseroon

translation.en: And we have put a barrier before them & a barrier behind them, and We have covered them up, so that they cannot see [Sura Yasin, Verse 9]

segments.arabic: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا
segments.transliteration: Wa Mai Yattaqi Allāha Yajʿal Lahu Makhrajāan

translation.en: Whoever is wary of Allah, He shall make for him a way out [of the adversities of the world and the Hereafter][Sura Talaq, Verses 2,]

segments.arabic: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚوَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ ۚإِنَّ اللَّهَ بَالِغُ أَمْرِهِ ۚقَدْ جَعَلَ اللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدْرًا
segments.transliteration: Wa Yarzuqhu Min Ĥaythu Lā Yaĥtasib. Wa Mai Yatawakkal ʿAlá Allāhi Fahuwa Ĥasbuh 'Inna Allāha Bālighu 'Amrihi Qad Jaʿala Allāhu Likulli Shay'in Qadrāa

translation.en: and provide for him from whence he does not count upon.And whoever puts his trust in Allah, He will suffice him. Indeed Allah carries through His commands. Certainly, Allah has ordained a measure [and extent] for everything. [Sura Talaq, Verse 3]

text.en: 11. Ya man yaqbalul yasīra

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْبَلُ الْيَسِيرَ وَ يَعْفو عَنِ الْكَثِيرَ،اِقْبَلْ مِنِّي الْيَسِيرَ وَ اعْفُ عَنِّى الْكَثِير،إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيم
segments.transliteration: Ya man Yaqbalul yasīra wa y’afo ‘Anil Kathīra Iqbal minnil Yasīra Wa ‘Āfo ‘Annil Kathīr innaka antal gahfoorror Rahim

translation.en: O He who accepts little & forgives much, accept the little from me and forgive the high number of sins as you are the best of Forgivers and Merciful

text.en: 12. Two short Duas to be recited daily from BY LADY KHADIJA(sa)

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّٰهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِيَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ اَسْتَغِيْثُ فَاَغِثْنِىوَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلٰى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ وَأَصْلِحْ لِى شَاْنِى كُلَّه
segments.transliteration: Ya Hayyu Ya Qayyoomu birahmatika astagheetho, fa-aghithniwa laa Takilni ila nafsee Tarfata Aynin abadan, wa as-lih Lee Shani kullahu

translation.en: In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. O Ever-Living, O Self-Sustaining, by Your mercy I seek help, so help me anddo not leave me to myself for the blink of an eye, and set right all my affairs.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّٰهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِيَا اللهُ يَا حَافِظُ يَا حَفِيظُ يَا رَقِيبُ
segments.transliteration: Ya Allaho Ya Haafizo Ya Hafizo Ya Raqeebo

translation.en: In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.O God, O Preserver, O Guardian, O Watcher.

text.en: 13. In "Tuhfatu Ridawiyah"

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ إِذا تَضايَقَتِ الْاُمُورُ فَتَحَ لَها باباً
segments.transliteration: Yā man idhā taḍāyaqatil-umūru fataḥa lahā bāban

translation.en: O You Who, when matters become constrained, open for them a door
That no thoughts have ever gone towards
Send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad
And open for my constrained matters a door
That no thought has ever gone towards
O Most Merciful of the merciful

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ إِذا تَضايَقَتِ الْاُمُورُ فَتَحَ لَها باباً لَمْ تَذْهَبْ إِلَيْهِ الْأَوْهامُ ، صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَافْتَحْ لِاُمُورِي الْمُتَضايِقَةِ باباً لَمْ يَذْهَبْ إِلَيْهِ وَهْمٌ يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمينَ .
segments.transliteration: O' He when the affairs has become difficult He opens ways we didn't imagine, so send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad, open ways out of my difficulties that I didn't imagine, O' the Most Merciful of the merciful.

translation.en: 14. Seeking Wellness

segments.arabic: اللهم إني أَسْأَلُكَ العَفْوَ والعَافِيَةَ والمُعَافَاةَ في الدُنْيا والآخِرَةْ .
segments.transliteration: Allhumma Inni Asaloka Al Afwa wal Afiyata walmuafata fiddunya wal akhira

translation.en: O Allah I ask you for Wellbeig in this word and the next

text.en: 15.Three Magnificient sentences from Imam `Ali ibn Abi-Talib (as)

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَفَىٰ بِيَ عِزّاً انْ اكُونَ لَكَ عَبْداً
segments.transliteration: ilahi kafa biya ʿizzan an akuna laka ʿabdan

translation.en: O my God, to be a servant of You is the ultimate of my honor

segments.arabic: وَكَفَىٰ بِيَ فَخْراً انْ تَكُونَ لِيَ رَبّاً
segments.transliteration: wa kafa biya fakhran an takuna li rabban

translation.en: and Your being my Lord is the ultimate of my pride.

segments.arabic: انْتَ كَمَا احِبُّ فَٱجْعَلْنِي كَمَا تُحِبُّ
segments.transliteration: anta kama uhibbu fajʿalni kama tuhibbu

translation.en: As You are as exactly as I love, please make me as exactly as You love

text.en: 16.Imam Muhammad Al-Baqir (as)

segments.arabic: يَا أسْمَعَ السَّامِعِينَ، وَيَا أبْصَرَ النّاظِرِينَ، وَيَا أسْرَعَ الحَاسِبِينَ، وَيَا أرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ، وَيَا أحْكَمَ الحَاكِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: Ya asma as saame eena wa ya absaran naazereena wa ya asraul haasebeena ya arham ar raahemeena wa ya ahkamul haakemeena

translation.en: O Most Hearing of hearers, O Most Seeing of seers, O Swiftest of reckoners, O Most Merciful of the merciful, O Most Just of judges.

text.en: 17.Comprehensive Dua For The World & Hereafter

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللّٰهِ الْعَظيْمِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ اَسْتَغْفِرُ اللّٰهَ وَاَسْئَلُهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ۔

translation.en: 18.For help in conveying your point in Speech / Meeting, Recite

segments.arabic: ك ه ي ع صح م ع س ققَالَ رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي ﴿٢٥﴾ وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي ﴿٢٦﴾ وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِي ﴿٢٧﴾ يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي ﴿٢٨﴾
segments.transliteration:
Short General Haajat duas from Baqiyatus SalehatFifth: Imam al-Sadiq (ʿa) is reported to have raised his hands towards the sky and said this supplicatory prayer:رب لا تكلني إلى نفسي طرفة عين أبداrabbi la takilni ila nafsi tarfata ʿaynin abadanO my Lord, never relegate me to myself even for a winking of an eye,لا أقل من ذلك ولا أكثرla aqalla min dhalika wa la aktharaless than that, or more than that.Sixth: Imam al-Sadiq (ʿa) is also reported to have advised of saying this supplicatory prayer:إرحمني مما لا طاقة لي به ولا صبر لي عليهirhamni mimma la taqata li bihi wa la sabra li ʿalayhi(Please) have mercy upon me against what I am too feeble to do and what I am too impatient to stand.Seventh: Imam al-Sadiq (ʿa) is also reported to have advised of saying this supplicatory prayer:اللهم إني أسألك بجلالك وجمالك وكرمك أن…allahumma inni as'aluka bijalalika wa jamalika wa karamika an…Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your majesty, beauty, and generosity toOne may now submit his requests.Eighth: Fadl ibn Yunus has reported that Imam al-Kazim (ʿa) advised him to repeat this supplicatory prayer very much:اللهم لا تجعلني من ٱلمعارينallahumma la tajʿalni min almuʿarinaO Allah, (please) do not make me of the unfixed-heartedولا تخرجني من ٱلتقصيرwa la tukhrijni min alttaqsiriand do not make me feel not negligent.To explain, the first statement is a prayer for not including with those whose faith is as irregular as loans, which means that faith is not fixed in their hearts. However, the statement may also stand for a prayer for not including with those whom are relegated to themselves and Allah the Almighty has no interference in their affairs, just like a horse whose rein is thrown freely on its wither and is left to graze uncontrollably.


The second statement is a prayer for not including with those who feel themselves to have carried out their duties towards their Lord flawlessly. In fact, one must always feel that he cannot carry out his duties towards his Lord fully whatever efforts he would exert.Ninth: Reported from Imam al-Baqir (as) "Allah swt has forgiven a Bedouin man for these two words he said in his prayer:اللهم إن تعذبني فأهل لذلك أنٱallahumma in tuʿadhdhibni fa'ahlun lidhalika anaO Allah, if You punish me, then this befits me,وإن تغفر لي فأهل لذلك أنتwa in taghfir li fa'ahlun lidhalika antabut if You forgive me, then it befits You.Tenth: Dawud al-Raqqi has said: Whenever he insisted in prayers, Imam al-Sadiq (ʿa) would pray Almighty Allah in the name of the Five Persons: the Holy Prophet, Imam ʿAli, Lady Fatimah, Imam al-Hasan, and Imam al-Husayn, peace be upon them.Eleventh: Yazid al-Sa'igh is reported to have said: I asked Imam al-Sadiq (ʿa) to pray Almighty Allah for our good. He therefore said:اللهم ٱرزقهم صدق ٱلحديثallahumma irzuqhum sidqa alhadithiO Allah, (please) endue them with truthfulness in speech,وأداء ٱلأمانةwa ada'a al-amanatifulfillment of trusts,وٱلمحافظة على ٱلصلواتwalmuhafazata ʿala alssalawatiand constant attendance to prayers.اللهم إنهم أحق خلقك أن تفعله بهمallahumma innahum ahaqqu khalqika an tafʿalahu bihimO Allah, they are the worthiest of all of Your creatures to obtain this from You;اللهم ٱفعله بهمallahumma ifʿalhu bihimtherefore, O Allah, do it to them.Twelfth: Say this supplicatory prayer, which Imam ʿAli Amir al-Mu'minin (ʿa) used to say:اللهم من علي بٱلتوكل عليكallahumma munna ʿalayya bilttawakkuli ʿalaykaO Allah, endue me with reliance on You,وٱلتفويض إليكwalttafwidi ilaykaentrusting (all my affairs) with You,وٱلرضا بقدركwalrrida biqadarikasatisfaction with Your decree,وٱلتسليم لأمركwalttaslimi li'amrikaand submission to Your ordinanceحتى لا أحب تعجيل ما أخرتhatta la uhibba taʿjila ma akhkhartaso that I would not long for hastening what You delayولا تأخير ما عجلتwa la ta'khira ma ʿajjaltaand delaying what You hasten.يا رب ٱلعالمينya rabba alʿalaminaO Lord of the worlds!Thirtieth: Yunus is reported to have asked Imam al-Rida (ʿa) for a brief supplicatory prayer; so, the Imam (ʿa) taught him to say this:يا من دلني على نفسهya man dallani ʿala nafsihiO He Who has guided me to Himselfوذلل قلبي بتصديقهwa dhallala qalbi bitasdiqihiand humiliated my heart by testifying to Him,أسألك ٱلأمن وٱلإيـمانas'aluka al-amna wal-imanaI beseech You for security and faith.

translation.en: Fifth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have raised his hands towards the sky and said this supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic: رَبِّ لاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلىٰ نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: rabbi la takilni ila nafsi tarfata ʿaynin abadan

translation.en: O my Lord, never relegate me to myself even for a winking of an eye,

segments.arabic: لاَ أَقَلَّ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ وَلاَ أَكْثَرَ
segments.transliteration: la aqalla min dhalika wa la akthara

translation.en: less than that, or more than that.

text.en: Sixth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is also reported to have advised of saying this supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic: إِرْحَمْنِي مِمَّا لاَ طَاقَةَ لِي بِهِ وَلاَ صَبْرَ لِي عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: irhamni mimma la taqata li bihi wa la sabra li ʿalayhi

translation.en: (Please) have mercy upon me against what I am too feeble to do and what I am too impatient to stand.

text.en: Seventh: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is also reported to have advised of saying this supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِجَلاَلِكَ وَجَمَالِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ أَنْ…
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bijalalika wa jamalika wa karamika an…

translation.en: Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your majesty, beauty, and generosity to

text.en: Eighth: Fadl ibn Yunus has reported that Imam al-Kazim (`a) advised him to repeat this supplicatory prayer very much:

translation.en: O Allah, (please) do not make me of the unfixed-hearted
and do not make me feel not negligent.

text.en: Ninth: Reported from Imam al-Baqir (as) "Allah swt has forgiven a Bedouin man for these two words he said in his prayer:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ تُعَذِّبْنِي فَأَهْلٌ لِذٰلِكَ أَنَٱ
segments.transliteration: allahumma in tuʿadhdhibni fa'ahlun lidhalika ana

translation.en: O Allah, if You punish me, then this befits me,

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ تَغْفِرْ لِي فَأَهْلٌ لِذٰلِكَ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa in taghfir li fa'ahlun lidhalika anta

translation.en: but if You forgive me, then it befits You.

text.en: Tenth: Dawud al-Raqqi has said: Whenever he insisted in prayers, Imam al-Sadiq (`a) would pray Almighty Allah in the name of the Five Persons: the Holy Prophet, Imam `Ali, Lady Fatimah, Imam al-Hasan,

segments.transliteration: Eleventh: Yazid al-Sa'igh is reported to have said: I asked Imam al-Sadiq (ʿa) to pray Almighty Allah for our good. He therefore said:

translation.en: allahumma irzuqhum sidqa alhadithi

text.en: O Allah, (please) endue them with truthfulness in speech,

translation.en: fulfillment of trusts,
and constant attendance to prayers.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ أَحَقُّ خَلْقِكَ أَنْ تَفْعَلَهُ بِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma innahum ahaqqu khalqika an tafʿalahu bihim

translation.en: O Allah, they are the worthiest of all of Your creatures to obtain this from You;
therefore, O Allah, do it to them.
O Allah, endue me with reliance on You,
entrusting (all my affairs) with You,
satisfaction with Your decree,
and submission to Your ordinance

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ أُحِبَّ تَعْجِيلَ مَا أَخَّرْتَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la uhibba taʿjila ma akhkharta

translation.en: so that I would not long for hastening what You delay
and delaying what You hasten.
O Lord of the worlds!

text.en: Thirtieth: Yunus is reported to have asked Imam al-Rida (`a) for a brief supplicatory prayer; so, the Imam (`a) taught him to say this:

translation.en: O He Who has guided me to Himself
and humiliated my heart by testifying to Him,
I beseech You for security and faith.

text.en: Morning and Evening Duas.
Morning-1
Morning-2Morning and EveningEveningResources
Morning and Evening
Evening
M O R N I N G
1.First: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said that Imam `Ali ibn al-Husayn Zayn al-`Abidin (`a) used to begin his day with the following statement

segments.arabic: أَبْتَدِئُ يَوْمِي هٰذَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْ نِسْيَانِي وَعَجَلَتِي
segments.transliteration: abtati'u yawmi hadha bayna yaday nisyani wa ʿajalati

translation.en: I begin this day of mine before I should forget and hasten to other affairs,
'with the Name of Allah'
and 'Only what Allah wills (shall come to pass).'

text.en: 2.Fourth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: My father (`a) used to begin his morning with the following prayer:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I put my trust),
to Allah (I resort),
in the way of Allah (I proceed),
and the principles of Allah's Messenger,
may Allah bless him and his Household (I follow).
O Allah, (please) protect me with the protection of faith

segments.transliteration: min bayni yadayya wa min khalfi

translation.en: before me, behind me,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿan yamini wa ʿan shimali

translation.en: to my right side, to my left side,

segments.transliteration: wa min fawqi wa min tahti

translation.en: above me, beneath me,
and in front of me.
There is no god save You.

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wala quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.
We beseech You for pardon and wellbeing
from all wicked matters and all evils
in this world and the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ عَذَابِ ٱلْقَبْرِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni aʿudhu bika min ʿadhabi alqabri

translation.en: O Allah, I pray for Your protection against the chastisement in the grave,
the pressure of graves,
and the tightness of graves.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ سَطَوَاتِ ٱللَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min satawati allayli walnnahari

translation.en: I pray Your protection against the calamities in nights and days.
O Allah, Lord of the Sacred Monument,
the Sacred City,
the lawful, and the consecration,

segments.arabic: أَبْلِغْ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِّيَ ٱلسَّلاَمَ
segments.transliteration: abligh muhammadan wa ala muhammadin ʿanni alssalama

translation.en: (please) convey peace to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad on behalf of me.
O Allah, I pray the protection of Your invulnerable armor
and I pray the protection of Your Wholeness
lest that You might cause me to die drowned, burned,
choked, beaten,
murdered, poisoned,
fallen in a well,
eaten by a beast,
sudden death,
or any violent death;
rather, cause me to die on my bed
obeying You and Your Messenger,
may Allah bless him and his Household,
following the truth unfailingly,

segments.arabic: أَوْ فِي ٱلصَّفِّ ٱلَّذِينَ نَعَتَّهُمْ فِي كِتَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw fi alssaffi alladhina naʿattahum fi kitabika
