translation.en: or to die in the ranks that You have described in Your Book
as a solid structure.
I pray for myself, my children,
and whatever my Lord has provided me
the protection of "Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the dawn
from the evil of what He has created,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqaba

translation.en: from the evil of the utterly dark night when it comes,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri alnnaffathati fi alʿuqadi

translation.en: from the evil of those who blow on knots,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri hasidin idha hasada

translation.en: and from the evil of the envious when he envies."
I pray for myself, my children,
and whatever my Lord has provided me
the protection of "Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of men,
the King of men,
the god of men,
from the evil of the whisperings of the slinking (Satan)
who whispers into the hearts of men
from among the jinn and the men."

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَدَدَ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi ʿadada ma khalaqa allahu

translation.en: Praise be to Allah as many as what Allah has created.
Praise be to Allah as same as what He has created.
Praise be to Allah as full as what He has created.
Praise be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Praise be to Allah as weighty as His Throne.
Praise be to Allah as much as it pleases Him.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إلاَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْحَلِيمُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu alhalimu alkarimu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah the Forbearing and All-generous.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إلاَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَلِيُّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu alʿaliyu alʿazimu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah the Most High and All-great.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَوَاتِ وَٱلأَرَضِينَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi rabbi alssamawati wal-aradina wa ma baynahuma

translation.en: Glory be to Allah the Lord of the heavens, the layers of the earth, and whatsoever is between them
and the Lord of the great Throne.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ دَرَكِ ٱلشَّقَاءِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni aʿudhu bika min daraki alshshqa'i

translation.en: O Allah, I pray Your protection against encounter of misery
and gloating of the enemies.

segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min alfaqri walwaqri

translation.en: I pray Your protection against poverty and rupture.

segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min su'i almanzari

translation.en: I pray Your protection against evil result

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: 3. Sixth: Imam al-Sadiq (as) advised the prayer "Allahumma laka alhamdu" be said in mornings:

translation.en: O Allah, all praise be to You.
I praise You and seek Your help.
You are my Lord
and I am Your servant.
I begin this morning committing myself to my pledge and promise to You,
having faith in Your promise,
and fulfilling my covenant to You as much as I can.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah,
One and Only and having no associate with Him.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan ʿabduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and messenger.
I am in this morning following the nature of Islam,
the creed of sincerity,
the principles of Abraham,
and the faith of Muhammad,
blessings of Allah be upon them and upon their households.
Carrying this faith, I will live and die,
if Allah wills.
O Allah, (please) make me live as long as You determine me to live

segments.transliteration: wa amitni idha amattani ʿala dhalika

translation.en: and cause me to die when You will decide to make me die following this faith,
and resurrect me, when You will resurrect me following this faith.
By so, I only desire for Your pleasure and for following Your path.
To You do I resort
and with You do I entrust my affairs.
The Family of Muhammad are my leaders;
I have no other leaders than they are.
I follow them,
accede to them,
and pattern after their examples.
O Allah, (please) make them my leaders
in this world and in the Hereafter,
keep me loyalist to their loyalists
and enemy of their enemies
in this world and in the Hereafter,
and include me with the righteous ones,
along with my ancestors.

text.en: 4. From Ususl Kafi

segments.arabic: إِذَا أَصْبَحْتَ أَصْبَحْتُ بِللَِّ مُؤْمِناً عَلَى دِينِ مَُمَّدٍ وَ سُنَّتِهِ وَ دِينِ عَلِيٍّ وَ سُنَّتِهِ وَِينِ الَْوْصِيَاءِ وَ سُنَّتِهِمْ

translation.en:
'I arise a believer in Allāh,upon the religion of Muḥammad and his sunnah, the religion of 'Alī and
his sunnah, and the religion of the Legatees (i.e. the infallible Imāms) and their sunnah.

segments.arabic: آمَنْتُ بِسِرِّهِمْ وَ عَلَنِيَتِهِمْ وَ شَاهِدِهِمْ وَ غَائِبِهِمْ

translation.en: I believe in their secrets and open declarations, when they are present or hidden;

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِللَِّ مَِّااسْتَعَاذَ مِنْهُ رَسُولُ اللَِّ وَ عَلِيٌّ وَ الَْوْصِيَاءُ

translation.en: and I seek Allāh's refuge from that which the Messenger of Allāh (ṣ) sought refuge, as did 'Alī ('a.s.) and the Legatees;
and I desire from Allāh that which they desired from Him,

segments.arabic: وَ لَ حَوْلَ وَ لَ قُوَّةَ إِلَّ بِللَِّ
segments.transliteration: and there is no might or power except by [the will of] Allāh.’”

translation.en: 5. Sahifa Alavia No. 59 and 60
"Glory be to Allāh, the King, the Most Holy

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma Innee A-O’ozo Beka Min Zawaale Ne’mateka

translation.en: O Allāh, I seek refuge with You from the waning of Your blessings,
change in the good health You have granted,
the suddenness of Your chastisement,
from falling into wretchedness,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا سَبَقَ فِ الْكِتَابِ
segments.transliteration: Wa Min Sharre Maa Sabaqa Fil Kitabik

translation.en: and from the evil that has previously befallen in the Book.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّ أَسْأَلُكَ بِعِزَّةِ مُلْكِكَ وَ شِدَّةِ قُوَّتِكَ وَ بِعَظِيمِ سُلْطَانِكَ وَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma Innee As-Aloka Be-I’zzate Mulkeka Wa Be-Shiddate Quwwateka Wa Be-A’zame Sultaaneka Wa Be-Qudrateka A’laa Khalqeka An Tosalleya A’laa Mohammadin Wa Aale Mohammadin Wa An Taf-A’la Be Kazaa

translation.en: O Allāh, I beg You by the glory of Your kingdom, the might of Your strength, the greatness of Your dominion and Your power over Your creation."'"
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَمْ يُصْبِحْ بِي مَيِّتًا.
segments.transliteration: Alhamdo Lillaahil Lazee Lam Yusbeh Bee Mayyetan.

translation.en: Praise be to Allah, Who made me such that I have not died.

segments.arabic: وَلَا سَقِيْمًا وَ لَا مَضْرُوْبًا عَلٰي عُرُوْقِيْ بِسُوٓءٍ.
segments.transliteration: Wa Laa Saqeeman Wa Laa Mazrooban A’laa O’rooqee Be-Sooo-In.

translation.en: Nor am I sick, nor have my veins been infected with disease.

segments.arabic: وَلَا مَاْخُوْذًا بِاَسْوَءِ عَمَلِيْ وَ لَا مَقْطُوْعًا دَابِرِيْ.
segments.transliteration: Wa Laa Maakhoozan Be-Aswa-E A’malee Wa Laa Maqtoo-A’n Daaberee.

translation.en: Nor have I been hauled up for my evil acts, nor am I without progeny.

segments.arabic: وَلَا مُرْتَدًّا عَنْ دِيْنِيْ وَ لَا مُنْکِرًا لِرَبِّيْ.
segments.transliteration: Wa Laa Murtaddan A’n Deenee Wa Laa Munkeran Lerabbee.

translation.en: Nor have I forsaken my religion, nor do I disbelieve in my Lord.

segments.arabic: وَلَا مُسْتَوْحِشًا مِنْ اِيْمَانِيْ وَ لَا مُلْتَبِسًا عَقْلِيْ.
segments.transliteration: Wa Laa Mustawheshan Min Eemaanee Wa Laa Multabesan A’qlee.

translation.en: Nor do I feel strangeness with my faith, nor is my intelligence affected.

segments.arabic: وَلَا مُعَذَّبًا بِعَذَابِ الْاُمَمِ مِنْ قَبْلِيْ.
segments.transliteration: Wa Laa Mo-A’zzaban Be-A’zaabil Omame Min Qablee.

translation.en: Nor have I been punished with the punishment of peoples before me.
I am a slave in Your possession; I have been guilty of excesses over myself.

segments.arabic: لَکَ الْحُجَّۃُ عَلَيَّ وَ لَا حُجَّۃَ لِيْ.
segments.transliteration: Lakal Hujjato A’layya Wa Laa Hujjata Lee.

translation.en: You have exhausted Your pleas over me and I have no plea (before You).

segments.arabic: وَلَا اَسْتَطِيْعُ اَنْ آخُذَ اِلَّا مَا اَعْطَيْتَنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: Wa Laa Astatee-O’ An Aakhoza Illaa Maa A-A’taytanee.

translation.en: I have no power to take except what You give me.

segments.transliteration: Wa Laa Attaqeya Illaa Maa Waqaytanee.

translation.en: And I cannot evade except what You save me from.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّي اَعُوْدُ بِکَ اَنْ اَفْتَقِرَ فِي غِنَاکَ.
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma Innee A-O’ozo Beka An Aftaqera Fee Ghenaaka.

translation.en: O Allah! I seek Your protection from becoming destitute despite Your riches.

segments.arabic: اَوْ اَضِلَّ فِي هُدَاکَ اَوْ اُضَامَ فِي سُلْطَانِکَ.
segments.transliteration: Aw Azilla Fee Hodaaka Aw Ozaama Fee Sultaaneka.

translation.en: From being misguided despite Your guidance, from being molested in Your realm.
And from being humiliated while authority rests with You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْمَعَل نَفְسِي أَوَّلَ کَرِيْمَۃٍ تَنْتَزِعُهَا مِن کَرَآئِمِي۔
segments.transliteration: Allaahummaj A’l Nafsee Awwala Kareematin Tantaze-O’haa Min Karaaa-Emee.

translation.en: O Allah! Let my spirit be the first of those good objects that You take from me.

segments.arabic: وَاَوَّلَ وَدِيعَۃٍ تَرْتَجِعُهَا مِن وَدَآئِع نِّعَمک عِنְدِي۔
segments.transliteration: Wa Awwala Wadee-A’tin Tartaje-O’haa Min Wadaaa-E-E’ Ne-A’meka I’ndee.

translation.en: And the first trust out of Your favors held in trust with me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّا نَعُؤوز بِک أَنْ تَذهَب عَنْ قَوِلک۔
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma Innaa Na-O’ozo Beka An Tazhaba A’n Qawleka.

translation.en: O Allah! We seek Your protection from turning away from Your command.
Or revolting against Your religion.

segments.arabic: اَو تَعَالَى بِنَا أَهَوَىٰنَا دُونَهُدَى الَّذِي جَآءَ مِن عِنَدک۔
segments.transliteration: Aw Tataa-Ba-A’ Benaa Ahwaaa-Onaa Doonal Hodal Lazee Jaaa-A Min I’ndeka.

translation.en: Or being led away by our desires instead of by guidance that comes from You.
There is no god save Allah;
One and Only Lord and having no associate with Him.
To him is the kingdom and to Him is all praise.
He gives life and causes to die
while He is Ever-living and He never dies.
In His hand is the good

segments.transliteration: wa huwa ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: and He has power over all things.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
All glory be to Allah.
There is no god save Allah.
All praise be to Allah.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذي بِهِ تَقُومُ السَّماءَ ، وَبِهِ تَقُومُ الْأَرْضَ،

translation.en: "O' Allah! Indeed I beseech You in You name with which the sky is upright, and with which the earth is upright
, and with which we differentiate between truth and evil,

segments.arabic: وَبِهِ تَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الْمُتَفَرِّقِ ، وَبِهِ تُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ ،

translation.en: and with which we join the separated ones, and with which we segregate the joined ones,

segments.arabic: وَبِهِ أَحْصَيْتَ عَدَدَ الرِّمالِ ، وَزِنَةَ الْجِبالِ ، وَكَيْلَ الْبِحارِ ،

translation.en: and with which we count the number of pebbles, and the weight of the mountains, and the measurement of the Oceans,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ لي مِنْ أَمْري فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً .

translation.en: to bless Mohammad and his holy Progeny, and to give me relief and a point of exit for my affair.[1]
O Greatest of the great,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ لَا وَزِيرَ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Lā Sharīka Lahu Wa Lā Wazīra

translation.en: O One without partner or helper,

segments.arabic: يَا خَالِقَ الشَّمْسِ وَ الْقَمَرِ الْمُنِيرِ
segments.transliteration: Ya Khāliq Ash-Shamsi Wa Al-Qamar Al-Munīri

translation.en: Creator of the shining sun and moon,
Protector of the fearful seeker of refuge,
Liberator of the bound captive,
Provider of the small child,
Healer of the broken bones,
Merciful to the elderly,
Light of all light,
Director of all affairs,
Resurrector of those in graves,
Healer of the hearts,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَشْغَلُهُ شُغُلٌ عَنْ شُغُلٍ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Lā Yashghaluhu Shughulun 'An Shughulin

translation.en: O One whose work is not hindered by other tasks,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَتَغَيَّرُ مِنْ حَالٍ إِلَى حَالٍ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Lā Yataghayyaru Min Ḥālin Ilā Ḥālin

translation.en: O One who is not subject to change from state to state,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى تَجَشُّمِ حَرَكَةٍ وَ لَا انْتِقَالٍ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Lā Yaḥtāju Ilā Tajashšumi Ḥarakatin Wa Lā Intiqālin

translation.en: O One who does not need movement or transfer,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَشْغَلُهُ شَأْنٌ عَنْ شَأْنٍ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Lā Yashghaluhu Sha'nun 'An Sha'nin

translation.en: O One whose affairs do not preoccupy Him from other matters,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُحِيطُ بِهِ مَوْضِعٌ وَ لَا مَكَانٌ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Lā Yuḥīṭu Bihi Mawḍi'un Wa Lā Makānun

translation.en: O One who is bound by no place or space,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَرُدُّ بِأَلْطَفِ الصَّدَقَةِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yaruddu Bi-Alṭafi Ṣadaqati Wa Ad-Du'ā'i

translation.en: O One who turns away decreed harm by subtle charity and supplication.

segments.arabic: عَنْ أَعْنَانِ السَّمَاءِ مَا حَتَمَ وَ أَبْرَمَ مِنْ سُوءِ الْقَضَاءِ
segments.transliteration: 'An A'nāni As-Samā'i Mā Ḥatama Wa Abrama Min Sū'i Al-Qaḍā'i

translation.en: From the heavens, what has been decreed and determined of evil fate,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَجْعَلُ الشِّفَاءَ فِيمَا يَشَاءُ مِنَ الْأَشْيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yaj'alu Ash-Shifā'a Fīmā Yashā'u Min Al-Ashyā'i

translation.en: O One who places healing in whatever He wills of things,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُمْسِكُ الرَّمَقَ مِنَ الْمُدْنِفِ الْعَمِيدِ الْعَلِيلِ بِمَا قَلَّ مِنَ الْغِذَاءِ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yum'siku Ar-Ramaq Min Al-Mudhnifi Al-'Amīdi Al-'Alīli Bi-Mā Qalla Min Al-Ghiḏā'i

translation.en: Who sustains the strength of the weary, weakened sick with minimal nourishment,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُزِيلُ بِأَدْنَى الدَّوَاءِ مَا غَلُظَ مِنَ الدَّاءِ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yuzīlu Bi-Adnā Ad-Dawā'i Mā Ghaluẓa Min Ad-Da'i

translation.en: Who removes severe illness with the simplest of remedies,
O One who teaches the ignorant,
O One who guides the misguided,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُنَزِّلُ السَّكِينَةَ عَلَى قُلُوبِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yunazzilu As-Sakīnata 'Alā Qulūbi Al-Mu'minīn

translation.en: O One who sends tranquility upon the hearts of believers,
O One who loves the truthful,
O One who employs angels for His servants,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَجْعَلُ الْحَرْبَ سِلْمًا وَ الْخَوْفَ أَمْنًا
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yaj'alu Al-Ḥarba Silman Wa Al-Khawfa Amnan

translation.en: O One who turns war into peace and fear into security,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرْسِلُ الرِّيَاحَ لِلرِّيَّ وَ الْمَطَرِ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yursilu Ar-Riyāḥa Lil-Riyy Wa Al-Maṭari

translation.en: O One who sends winds for irrigation and rain,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُنْعِمُ عَلَى الْعَبِيدِ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ

translation.en: O One who bestows blessings upon His servants,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُحَقِّقُ الْأَمَالَ وَ يَسْمَعُ الدُّعَاءَ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yuḥaqqiqu Al-Amāl Wa Yasma'u Ad-Du'ā'a

translation.en: O One who fulfills hopes and hears supplications,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَرْزُقُ النَّاسَ مِنْ غَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Yarzuqu An-Nāsa Min Ghayri Ḥisābin

translation.en: O One who provides for people without account,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ وَ كُلُّ قَدَرٍ
segments.transliteration: Ya Man Lahu Kullu Shay'in Wa Kullu Qadar

translation.en: O One to whom all things and all destinies belong,

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his family,
And hasten my relief,
And forgive my missteps,
And have mercy on my tears,

segments.arabic: وَ ارْدُدْنِي إِلَى أَفْضَلِ عَادَاتِكَ عِنْدِي

translation.en: And return me to Your best practices with me,

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتَقْبِلْ بِي صِحَّةً مِنْ سُقْمِي
segments.transliteration: Wa Istaqbil Bī Ṣiḥḥatan Min Suqmī

translation.en: And grant me health from my illness,
And abundance from my poverty,
And comprehensive well-being in my body,
And clear insight in my faith,

segments.arabic: وَ مَهِّدْنِي وَ أَعِنِّي عَلَى اسْتِغْفَارِكَ

translation.en: And enable me, and aid me in seeking Your forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتِقَالَتِكَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَفْنَى الْأَجَلُ
segments.transliteration: Wa IstiqālatiKa Qabla An Yafnā Al-Ajal

translation.en: Before the term ends,
And hope is cut off.

segments.arabic: وَ أَعِنِّي عَلَى الْمَوْتِ وَ كُرْبَتِهِ

translation.en: Assist me in death and its pangs,
The grave and its isolation,

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ نَجَاحَ الْعَمَلِ قَبْلَ انْقِطَاعِ الْأَجَلِ
segments.transliteration: Wa As'aluka Najāḥa Al-'Amal Qabla Inqiṭā'i Al-Ajal

translation.en: And I ask You for success in deeds before life ends,

segments.transliteration: Wa Quwwatan Fī Sam'ī Wa Baṣarī

translation.en: Strength in my hearing and sight,

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتِعْمَالِ الْعَمَلِ الصَّالِحِ مِمَّا عَلَّمْتَنِي وَ فَهَّمْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: Wa Isti'māla Al-'Amal As-Ṣāliḥ Mimmā 'Allamtanī Wa Fahhamtanī

translation.en: And the ability to use good deeds from what You taught me and made me understand.
Indeed, You are the Glorious Lord,
And I am the weak servant,
And the difference between us is vast.
O Most Compassionate, O Most Beneficent,
O Lord of Majesty and Honor,
Bless the one who brought us understanding,

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ أَقْرَبُ وَسَائِلِنَا إِلَيْكَ رَبَّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ عِتْرَتِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: Wa Huwa Aqrabu Wasīlinā Ilayka Rabbana Muḥammadin Wa Ālihi Wa 'Itratihi At-Ṭāhirīn

translation.en: And is our nearest intercessor to You, our Lord—Muhammad and his pure family and lineage.
All praise be to the Lord of morning.
All praise be to the Cleaver of daybreak.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَذْهَبَ ٱللَّيْلَ بِقُدْرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi adh-haba allayla biqudratihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has taken away the night by His power
and brought the day through His mercy.

text.en:
3. It is narrated in Kafi3297‒23., through a chain of narrators, from Furaat Ibn
al-Ahnaf, who narrates from Imam Sadeq (a.s.) that he (a.s.) said,You may neglect to do anything, but never neglect saying the following prayer in mornings and evenings

translation.en: O Allah, I implore for You forgiveness
in this morning
and on this day
for purpose of winning Your mercy.

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ilayka min ahli laʿnatika

translation.en: I disavow in Your presence the people cursed by You.
O Allah, I disavow in Your presence
on this day
and in this morning

segments.arabic: مِمَّنْ نَحْنُ بَيْنَ ظَهْرَانيْهِمْ مِنَ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
segments.transliteration: mimman nahnu bayna zahranihim min almushrikina

translation.en: the polytheists we live among them
and (disavow) what they are worshipping.
Truly, they were a people given to evil, a rebellious people.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ مَا أَنْزَلْتَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ إِلَىٰ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ijʿal ma anzalta min alssama'i ila al-ardi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) cause what You have brought down from the heavens to the earth
in this morning
and on this day
to be blessing for Your saints
and punishment poured on Your enemies.
O Allah, (please) accede to those who are loyal to You
and feud with those who act hostilely towards You.
O Allah, (please) seal my affairs with security and faith
whenever the sun rises or sets.
O Allah, (please) forgive me and my parents
and have mercy upon them as they have cherished me in my childhood.
O Allah, (please) forgive the believing men and women
and the Muslim men and women,
both the alive and the dead.

segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka taʿlamu munqalabahum wa mathwahum

translation.en: O Allah, You do know their place of returning and their place of rest.
O Allah, (please) safeguard the leader of Muslims
with the protection of faith,
help him with powerful help,
grant him easy victory,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لَهُ وَلَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَاناً نَصِيراً
segments.transliteration: wajʿal lahu wa lana min ladunka sultanan nasiran

translation.en: and grant him and us from Your presence a sustaining power.
O Allah, (please) curse so-and-so and so-and-so­
as well as the factions that have dissented from Your Messenger,
from the men of authority after Your Messenger,
from the leaders who came after him, and from their partisans.
I also beseech You from more favor,

segments.arabic: وَٱلإِقْرَارَ بِمَا جَاءَ بِهِ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: wal-iqrara bima ja'a bihi min ʿindika

translation.en: acknowledgement of what has come from You,
submission to Your decree,
and steadfastness in what You have ordered of.
I neither intend to find another alternative than it

segments.transliteration: wa la ashtari bihi thamanan qalilan

translation.en: nor do I take a mean price in exchange for it.
O Allah, (please) guide me among those whom You guide
and save me from the evil of what You have decided,

segments.transliteration: innaka taqdi wa la yuqda ʿalayka

translation.en: for You decree and no one can decree against Your decree
and no humiliation will ever afflict one whom You support.
Blessed by You and exalted by You.
Glory be to You, O Lord of the House.
Accept my prayer.

segments.arabic: وَمَا تَقَرَّبْتُ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ خَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ma taqarrabtu bihi ilayka min khayrin

translation.en: As for whatever virtuous item through which I have sought nearness to You,
(please) double it for me many folds.

segments.transliteration: wa atina min ladunka ajran ʿaziman

translation.en: Grant us from Your Presence a great reward.
O my Lord, how excellent Your favors to me are!
How great Your donations to me are!
How lasting the wellbeing with which You have endued me is!
Too many times have You covered my faults!
So, all praise be to You, O my God;
such praise that is pleasant, blessed,
as full as the heavens,
as full as the earth,

segments.transliteration: wa mil'a ma sha'a rabbi wa radiya

translation.en: as full as what my Lord wills and pleases,
and as it fits the Face of my Lord,
the Lord of majesty and honoring.

text.en: : 4. Muhammad ibn Fudayl has reported that he wrote a letter to Imam Muhammad al-Taqi (al-Jawad) (`a) asking him to teach him a supplicatory prayer. The Imam's answer came: In mornings and evening, you may say the following statement:

translation.en: Allah, Allah, Allah is my lord,
the All-beneficent and All-merciful.
I do not admit any one as partner of Him.

segments.transliteration: subhana rabbika rabbi al-ʿizzati ʿamma yasifuna

translation.en: "Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Honor, above what they describe.
And Peace be upon the messengers.
And all praise is due to Allah the Lord of the worlds."

segments.transliteration: fasubhana allahi hina tumsuna wa hina tusbihuna

translation.en: "Therefore, glory be to Allah when you enter upon the time of the evening and when you enter upon the time of the morning;

segments.transliteration: wa lahu alhamdu fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: and to Him belongs praise in the heavens and the earth,
and at nightfall and when you are at midday.
He brings forth the living from the dead
and brings forth the dead from the living,
and gives life to the earth after its death,
and thus shall you be brought forth."
Glorified and Sacred be You;
our Lord and the Lord of the angels and the Holy Spirit.
Your mercy has preceded Your wrath.
There is no god save You.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي فَٱغْفِرْ لِي
segments.transliteration: subhanaka inni zalamtu nafsi faghfir li

translation.en: Glory be to You. I have wronged myself; so, forgive me,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْنِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: warhamni wa tub ʿalayya innaka anta alttawwabu alrrahimu

translation.en: have mercy upon me, and accept my repentance, for You are the Oft-Returning, the All-merciful.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّوْمُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ اسْتَغِيْتُ فَاَغِثْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: yaa hayyo yaa qayyoomo be-rahmateka ataghnaito,

translation.en: O Living. O eternal, by your mercy, I seek your refuge (so give me refuge)

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَكِلْنِيْ اِلٰى نَفْسِيْ طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ اَبَدًا،
segments.transliteration: fa-aghisnee wa laa tiklnee elaa nafsee tarfata a’ynin abadan,

translation.en: and do not leave me to my self even for the blink of the eye, ever.
And reform all my conditions
on account of your mercy, o most merciful

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ ما شاءَ اللَّهُ ، لايَصْرِفُ السُّوءَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ ، بِسْمِ اللَّهِ ما شاءَ اللَّهُ ، لايَسُوقُ الْخَيْرَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ ، بِسْمِ اللَّهِ ما شاءَ اللَّهُ ، ما يَكُونُ مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ فَمِنَ اللَّهِ . بِسْمِ اللَّهِ ما شاءَ اللَّهُ ، لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلّا بِاللَّهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظيمِ ، بِسْمِ اللَّهِ ما شاءَ اللَّهُ ، وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ الطَّيِّبينَ .
segments.transliteration: By the name of Allah and His wishes, no one turns away evils except Allah, by the name of Allah and His wishes, no one that do convey goods except Allah, by the name of Allah and His wishes, what ever bounty one possess is from Allah, by the name of Allah and His wishes, there is no power nor strength except that of Allah the Exalted, the Greatest, blessing be on Muhammad and on his pure and holy progeny.

translation.en: 8. From Usul Kafi

segments.arabic:
الْحَمْدُ لَِّ الَّذِي يَفْعَلُ مَا
يَشَاءُ وَ لَ يَفْعَلُ مَا يَشَاءُ غَيْرُهُ الَْمْدُ لَِّ كَمَا يُِبُّ اللَُّ أَنْ يُْمَدَ الَْمْدُ لَِّ كَمَا هُوَ أَهْلُهُ
اللَّهُمَّ أَدْخِلْنِ فِ كُلِّ خَيٍْ أَدْخَلْتَ فِيهِ مَُمَّداً وَ آلَ مَُمَّدٍ وَ أَخْرِجْنِ مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ أَخْرَجْتَ
مِنْهُ مَُمَّداً وَ آلَ مَُمَّدٍ وَ صَلَّى اللَُّ عَلَى مَُمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مَُمَّدٍ.

translation.en:
"All praise belongs to
Allāh Who does as He wishes and no one other than Him can do as he
wishes. All praise be to Allāh, the way Allāh loves to be praised. All praise
be to Allāh, just as He is deserving of it. O Allāh, make me enter upon every
good that you made Muḥammad and the Household of Muḥammad enter,
and take me out of every evil that you took Muḥammad and the Household
of Muḥammad out of it, and the blessing of Allāh be upon Muḥammad and
the Household of Muḥammad."'"

segments.arabic:
لَ
إِلَهَ إِلَّ اللَُّ وَحْدَهُ لَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَ لَ ه الَْمْدُ يُْيِي وَ يُِيتُ وَ يُِيتُ وَ يُْيِي وَ هُوَ حَيٌّ
لَ يَُوتُ بِيَدِهِ الَْيْرُ وَ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَ يءٍ قَدِيرٌ عَشْرَ مَرَّاتٍ وَ تَقُولُ أَعُوذُ بِللَِّ السَّمِيعِ الْعَلِيمِ
مِنْ هَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَنْ يَْضُرُونِ إِنَّ اللََّ هُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ

translation.en:
'There is no deity but Allāh,
alone, without any partner. His is the Kingdom and all praise belongs to
Him. He gives life and causes death, He causes death and gives life, and He
is ever-living and does not die. In His hand is all good and He has power
over all things.' Then he should say ten times: 'I seek refuge with Allāh,the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing, from the whisperings of the devils and
I seek Your refuge, O Lord, from their presence near me, indeed Allāh is
All-Hearing, All-Knowing,'

segments.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِ
فِ دِرْعِكَ الَْصِينَةِ الَّتِ تَْعَلُ فِيهَا مَنْ تُرِيدُ

translation.en:
'O Allāh, place me in your protective shield
wherein You place those whom You wish.'

segments.arabic:
أَصْبَحْتُ وَ رَبِّ مَْمُودٌ أَصْبَحْتُ لَ أُشْرِكُ بِللَِّ شَيْئاً وَ لَ أَدْعُو مَعَهُ
إِلَاً وَ لَ أَتَِّذُ مِنْ دُونِهِ وَلِيّاً

translation.en:
"I awake and my Lord be praised. I awake without
ascribing anything as a partner to Allāh, and I do not call upon any other
god with Him, nor do I take any guardian besides Him."

segments.arabic:
إِذَا أَصْبَحَ قَالَ أَصْبَحْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ مَا أَصْبَحَتْ بِ مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ
أَوْ عَافِيَةٍ فِ دِينٍ أَوْ دُنْيَا فَإِنَّهَا مِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ فَلَكَ الَْمْدُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ وَ لَكَ
الشُّكْرُ كَثِير
segments.transliteration:
“I wake up taking You as my witness that whatever I have awoken with of blessings and wellbeing
in my religion or of this world 

– it is all from You alone, without and
partner. So, all praise belongs to You for this, and plentiful gratitude.”

translation.en: Evening Duas

text.en: Second: Imam al-Sadiq (`a)

translation.en: I entrust with Allah the Most High, the All-high,
the All-majestic, and the All-great
my self and whatever concerns me.
I entrust my self with Allah
the feared, the dreaded,
and to Whose greatness all things submit.

text.en: Third: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) advised to enter your evening with the following prayer:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِنْدَ إِقْبَالِ لَيْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka ʿinda iqbali laylika

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You at the coming of Your night,
the departure of Your daytime,
the presence of the prayers to You,
and the voices of supplications to You

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

text.en: Tenth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said to Dawud al-Raqqi: Do not miss repeating the following supplicatory prayer three times in mornings and three times in evenings:

translation.en: O Allah, (please) include me with Your invulnerable shield
with which You include whomever You want.
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَدًا وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ
segments.transliteration: al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī lam yattakhidh waladan wa lam yakun lahu sharīkun

translation.en: Praise be to Allah, who has not taken a son and has no partner

segments.arabic: فِي الْمُلْكِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي يَصِفُ وَلَا يُوصَفُ
segments.transliteration: fī al-mulki al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī yaṣifu wa lā yūṣafu

translation.en: In the kingdom. Praise be to Allah, who describes and is not described,

segments.arabic: وَيَعْلَمُ وَلَا يُعْلَمُ يَعْلَمُ خَائِنَةَ الْأَعْيُنِ وَمَا تُخْفِي الصُّدُورُ
segments.transliteration: wa yaʿlamu wa lā yuʿlamu yaʿlamu khāʾinata al-ʾaʿyuni wa mā tukhfī al-ṣudūru

translation.en: And knows and is not known. He knows the treachery of the eyes and what the hearts conceal.

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ الْكَرِيمِ وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: ʾaʿūdhu bi-wajhi Allāhi al-karīmi wa bi-smi Allāhi al-ʿaẓīmi

translation.en: I seek refuge in the noble countenance of Allah and in the name of Allah, the Great,

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ مَا ذَرَأَ وَمَا بَرَأَ وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا تَحْتَ الثَّرَى
segments.transliteration: min sharri mā dharaʾa wa mā baraʾa wa min sharri mā taḥta al-thará

translation.en: From the evil of what He created and originated, and from the evil of what is beneath the soil,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا ظَهَرَ وَمَا بَطَنَ وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا كَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri mā ẓahara wa mā baṭana wa min sharri mā kāna

translation.en: And from the evil of what is visible and what is hidden, and from the evil of what is

segments.arabic: فِي اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ وَمِنْ شَرِّ أَبِي مُرَّةَ وَمَا وَلَدَ
segments.transliteration: fī al-layli wa al-nahāri wa min sharri abī murrata wa mā walada

translation.en: In the night and the day, and from the evil of Abi Murrah and what he begets,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ الرَّسِيسِ وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا وَصَفْتُ وَمَا لَمْ أَصِفْ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri al-rasīsi wa min sharri mā waṣaftu wa mā lam aṣif

translation.en: And from the evil of ar-Rasees, and from the evil of what I have described and what I have not described.
So praise be to Allah, Lord of the worlds.

text.en: Sunset Duas

It is highly advisable to engage yourself in  glorification of Almighty Allah and implorations for His forgiveness, because this hour is as important  as the pre-sunrise hour, as Almighty Allah has said in the Holy Quran:

segments.arabic: وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ.

translation.en: And sing the praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before the setting.

text.en: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said, “When the color of the sun changes (i.e. the sun is about to set), you must remember Allah the Almighty and Majestic. If you are at that hour with one who preoccupies you from this, you must leave him and supplicate.

translation.en: In this evening, my wrongdoing is taking shelter in Your pardon,
my sins are taking shelter in Your forgiveness,
my fear is taking shelter in Your security,
my humility is taking shelter in Your dignity,
my poverty is taking shelter in Your richness,

segments.arabic: وَأَمْسَىٰ وَجْهِيَ ٱلْبَالِي مُسْتَجِيراً بِوَجْهِكَ ٱلدَّائِمِ ٱلْبَاقِي
segments.transliteration: wa amsa wajhiya albali mustajiran biwajhika aldda'imi albaqi

translation.en: and my mortal face is taking shelter in Your Face, the Undying and Perpetual.
O Allah, (please) dress me with Your wellbeing,
cover me with Your mercy,
overshadow me with Your honoring,

segments.arabic: وَقِنِي شَرَّ خَلْقِكَ مِنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلإِنْسِ
segments.transliteration: wa qini sharra khalqika min aljinni wal-insi

translation.en: and protect me against the evils of Your creatures—jinn and men.

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya rahmanu ya rahimu

translation.en: O Allah! O All-beneficent! O All-merciful!

text.en: Continue the supplication to be said at sunset as under:

translation.en: O He Who has sealed the Prophethood with Muhammad,
Allah may bless him and his Household,

segments.arabic: إِخْتِمْ لِي فِي يَوْمِي هٰذَا بِخَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: ikhtim li fi yawmi hadha bikhayrin

translation.en: (please) seal with goodness this day of mine,
this month of mine,
this year of mine,
and my entire lifetime.

text.en: You may say the words of professing that there is no god save Allah and the words of seeking His protection, which will be mentioned in the coming chapter about the supplications in mornings and evenings. You may then put your hand on the head and pass it over your face.
You may then hold your beard and say the following

translation.en: I include myself, my family,
my property, and my sons,
both the absent and the present

segments.arabic: بِٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: billahi alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: with Allah save Whom there is no god,
the Knower of the unseen and the seen,
the All-beneficent, the All-merciful,
the Ever-living, the Self-subsisting.

segments.transliteration: la ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawmun

translation.en: Slumber does not overtake Him nor sleep.

segments.arabic: لَهُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: lahu ma fi alssamawati wa ma fi al-ardi

translation.en: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth is His.

segments.arabic: مَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ
segments.transliteration: man dha alladhi yashfa`u `indahu illa bi'idhnihi

translation.en: Who is he that can intercede with Him but by His permission?

segments.arabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ ايْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: ya`lamu ma bayna aydihim wa ma khalfahum

translation.en: He knows what is before them and what is behind them,

segments.arabic: وَلا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَا شَاءَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yuhituna bishay'in min `ilmihi illa bima sha'a

translation.en: and they cannot comprehend anything out of His knowledge except what He pleases.
His knowledge extends over the heavens and the earth,
and the preservation of them both tires Him not,
and He is the Most High, the Great.

text.en: Imam Ali (as) Sunset Dua from Sahifa Alawiya  وَکَانَ مِنْ دُعَآئِہٖ عَلَیْہِ السَّلاَمُ بَعْدَ الْفِرَاغِ مِنَ الزَّوَالِ

translation.en: In the name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰہُمَّ اِنِّیْ اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَیْکَ بِجُوْدِکَ وَ کَرَمِکَ وَ اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَیْکَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِکَ وَ رَسُوْلِکَ وَ اَتَقَرُّبُ اِلَیْکَ بِمَلَآئِکَتِکَ الْمُقَرَّبِیْنَ وَ اَنْبِیَآئِکَ الْمُرْسَلِیْنَ وَ بِکَ اَللّٰہُمَّ لَکَ الْغِنٰی وَ بِیَ الْفَاقَۃُ اِلَیْکَ اَنْتَ الْغَنِیُّ وَ اَنَا الْفَقِیْرُ اِلَیْکَ اَقِلْنِیْ عَثْرَتِیْ وَاسْتُرْ عَلَیَّ ذُنُوْبِیْ وَاقْضِ الْیَوْمَ حَاجَتِیْ وَلاَ تُعَذِّبْنِیْ بِقَبِیْحِ مَا تَعْلَمُ مِنِّیْ بَلْ عَفْوُکَ یَسْعُنِیْ وَ جُوْدُکَ

translation.en: I wish to seek proximity to You by Your grace and generosity and by Your special servant Mohammed peace be on him and his progeny and through You and through the angels who are near to You. O Allah Self Sufficiency belongs to You and for me is the dependency in Your Presence You are rich and I am indigent forgive my laxities, conceal my sins, and today fulfill my desires, and whatever sins You are aware of, don't chastise me, but put me in Your mercy and Generosity
(then go in Sajdah and recite)

segments.arabic: یَا اَہْلَ التَّقْوٰی وَ یَا اَہْلَ الْمَغْفِرَۃِ یَا بَرُّ یَا رَحِیْمُ اَنْتَ اَبَرُّ بِیْ مِنْ اَبِیْ وَ اُمِّیْ وَ مِنْ جَمِیْعٍ الْخَلَآئِقِ اَقْبِسْنِیْ بِقَضَآءِ حَاجَتِیْ مُجَاباً دُعَآئِیْ مَرْحُوْمًا صَوْتِیْ قَدْ کَشَفْتَ اَنْوَاعَ الْبَلاَ یَا عَنِیْ

translation.en: O the center of piety, O the possessor of forgiveness, O the most generous for the doers of good. You are more generous than my father, my mother and the entire universe. Pass my life in fulfilling my desires. Accept my prayers, have mercy on my voice, You have averted various types of difficulties from me.

text.en: Duas for each hour of Ahlulbayt (عليهم السلام)

Shaykh al-Tusi, Sayyid Ibn Baqi, and Shaykh al-Kaf`ami have divided the day into twelve hours, dedicating each hour to one of the Twelve Imams (`a) and mentioning an advocacy-seeking supplication (i.e. tawassul) addressed to the Imam of that hour. Although these master scholars have not mentioned any tradition that is reported from the Holy Imams (`a) about this division, we, depending on the high regard of these scholars, can say that they would never say or do anything unless they had acquainted themselves with a narration indicating that saying or deed. However, in this brief book, I will mention only the supplicatory prayers that I have quoted from the book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid (by Shaykh al-Tusi).
FIRST HOUR-IMAM `ALI AMIR AL-MU'MININ (`A)
The first hour of the day, which is the space of time between dawn and sunrise, is dedicated to Imam `Ali Amir al-Mu'minin (`a). The supplication at this hour is as follows:

translation.en: O Allah, O Lord of brilliance, greatness,
grandeur, and authority!
You have demonstrated the power as You wished,
bestowed upon Your servants with Your forgiveness,
dominated over them with Your supremacy,
and taught them how to thank Your graces.
O Allah, in the name of `Ali, the well-pleased for the religion,
the well-versed with the judgment and the streams of piety,
and the leader of the pious,

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلاوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: salli `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-awwalina wal-akhirina

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household among the past and the coming generations,
and I present him (i.e. `Ali) as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ …
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: [I beseech You] to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: SECOND HOUR-IMAM AL-HASAN IBN `ALI (`A)
The second hour, which is the space of time between sunrise and disappearance of the redness of the sun, is dedicated to Imam al-Hasan ibn `Ali (`a). The following is the supplication at this hour:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَبِسْتَ بَهَاءَكَ فِي اعْظَمِ قُدْرَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma labista baha'aka fi a`zami qudratika

translation.en: O Allah, You have dressed Yourself with Your brilliance in the greatest level of Your power.

segments.transliteration: wa safa nuruka fi anwari daw'ika

translation.en: Your Light has been clear in the most glowing level of Your brightness.
Your knowledge has surpassed Your Screen.

segments.arabic: وَخَلَّصْتَ فِيهِ اهْلَ ٱلثِّقَةِ بِكَ عِنْدَ جُودِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa khallasta fihi ahla alththiqati bika `inda judika

translation.en: Through it (i.e. knowledge), You have accurately selected those having full trust in You, out of Your magnanimity.
So, exalted by You in Your grandeur

segments.arabic: عُلُوّاً عَظُمَتْ فِيهِ مِنَّتُكَ عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ

translation.en: with such exaltation due to which Your conferrals upon the people of obedience to You have been immense.

segments.arabic: فَبَاهَيْتَ بِهِمْ أَهْلَ سَمَاوَاتِكَ بِمِنَّتِكَ عَلَيْهِمْ

translation.en: You therefore boasted the inhabitants of Your heavens about Your favoring upon them (i.e. the obedient to You).

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَبِحَقِّ ٱلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْكَ أَسْالُكَ

translation.en: O Allah, in the name the regard of al-Hasan, the son of `Ali, with You I beseech You,
and in his name too, I seek Your succor
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
THIRD HOUR -IMAM AL-HUSAYN IBN `ALI(AS)
The third hour, which is from disappearance of the ray of the sun to the rising of the daylight, is dedicated to Imam al-Husayn ibn `Ali (`a). The following is the supplication at this hour:

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَجَبَّرَ فَلاَ عَيْنٌ تَرَاهُ

translation.en: O He Who is too Omnipotent to be seen by any eye!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَعَظَّمَ فَلاَ تَخْطُرُ ٱلْقُلُوبُ بِكُنْهِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man ta`azzama fala takhturu alqulubu bikunhihi

translation.en: O He Who is so Great that hearts cannot even imagine His quiddity!
O most Excellent in favoring!
O most Excellent in condonation!
O most Excellent in pardoning!
O All-magnanimous! O All-generous!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يُشْبِهُهُ شَيْءٌ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yushbihuhu shay'un min khalqihi

translation.en: O He none of Whose creatures is like Him!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ مَنَّ عَلَىٰ خَلْقِهِ بِاوْلِيَائِهِ

translation.en: O He Who has conferred a benefit upon His creatures through His Vicegerents
whom He has accepted for His religion,
through whom He has disciplined His servants,

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلَهُمْ حُجَجاً مَنّاً مِنْهُ عَلَىٰ خَلْقِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`alahum hujajan mannan minhu `ala khalqihi

translation.en: and whom He has made arguments against His creatures, out of His favor!
I beseech You in the name of al-Husayn the son of `Ali,
peace be upon both of them,
the grandson who is subservient to Your pleasure,
sincere in Your religion,
and the signpost on Your Essence;
I thus beseech You in the name of him
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
FOURTH HOUR-IMAM `ALI IBN AL-HUSAYN (`A)
The fourth hour is the space of time between the rise of daylight up to midday. It is dedicated to Imam `Ali ibn al-Husayn (`a). The following is the supplication at this hour:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَفَا نُورُكَ فِي اتَمِّ عَظَمَتِكَ

translation.en: O Allah, very clear is Your Light in Your most perfect greatness.
Very exalted is Your brightness in Your most brilliant glow.

segments.arabic: أَسْالُكَ بِنُورِكَ ٱلَّذِي نَوَّرْتَ بِهِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka binurika alladhi nawwarta bihi alssamawati wal-aradina

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Light by which You have lit up the heavens and the layers of the earth,
annihilated the tyrants,
restored the dead to life,
caused the alive to die,
brought together the scattered,
split the brought together,
perfected the Words,
and established the heavens.

segments.arabic: أَسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ وَلِيِّكَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your vicegerent, `Ali the son of al-Husayn,
peace be upon both of them,
who defended Your religion
and strove painstakingly for Your sake;
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
FIFTH HOUR IMAM MUHAMMAD AL-BAQIR (`A)

The fifth hour of the day, which is the space of time between midday and the amount of four units of prayer after midday, is dedicated to Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (`a). The supplication at this hour is as follows:

translation.en: O Allah, O Lord of brightness, greatness,
light, grandeur, and authority!
You have practiced omnipotence in the greatness of Your brilliance,
conferred upon Your servants with the favor of Your kindness and mercy,
showed them where Your pleasure lies,

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَ لَهُمْ دَلِيلاًَ يَدُلُّهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَحَبَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`alta lahum dalilan yadulluhum `ala mahabbatika

translation.en: and made for them a sign guiding them to Your love,
teaching them the items that You love,
and showing them Your volition.
O Allah, in the name of the regard of Muhammad, the son of `Ali,
peace be upon both of them, with You, I beseech You
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
Sixth Hour Imam Ja`far Ibn Muhammad Al-sadiq -before Midday Upto Zuhr

The sixth hour, which is the space of time between the amount of four units of prayer before midday up to the time of the Noon Prayer, is dedicated to Imam Ja`far ibn Muhammad al-Sadiq (`a). The supplication at this hour is the following:

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَطُفَ عَنْ إِدْرَاكِ ٱلأَوْهَامِ

translation.en: O He Who is too subtle to be comprehended by illusions!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ كَبُرَ عَنْ مَوْجُودِ ٱلْبَصَرِ

translation.en: O He Who is too great to be observed by existent sights!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَعَالَىٰ عَنِ ٱلصِّفَاتِ كُلِّهَا

translation.en: O He Who is too exalted above all attributes!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَلَّ عَنْ مَعَانِي ٱللُّطْفِ

translation.en: O He Who is too majestic above all significances of subtlety
and too subtle above all significances of majesty!

segments.transliteration: as'aluka binuri wajhika wa diya'i kibriya'ika

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the light of Your Face and the brightness of Your grandeur
and I beseech You in the name of Your greatness
to grant me salvation from Your Fire.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bihaqqi ja`fari bni muhammadin `alayka

translation.en: I also beseech You in the name of the regard of Ja`far, the son of Muhammad, with You
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
Seventh Hour -imam Musa Ibn Ja`far Al-kazim

The seventh hour, which is the space of time between the Noon Prayer and the amount of four units of prayer before afternoon, is dedicated to Imam Musa ibn Ja`far al-Kazim (`a). The supplication at this hour is as follows:

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَكَبَّرَ عَنِ ٱلأَوْهَامِ صُورَتُهُ

translation.en: O He Whose Figure is too great above all illusions!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَعَالَىٰ عَنِ ٱلصِّفَاتِ نُورُهُ

translation.en: O He Whose Light is too elevated above attributes!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ قَرُبَ عِنْدَ دُعَاءِ خَلْقِهِ

translation.en: O He Whose is Nigh when His creatures pray Him!
O He Whom is supplicated by the distressed,
to Whom the afraid have recourse,
asked by the believers,
served by the thankful,
and praised by the sincere!
I beseech You in the name of Your glowing light
and the regard of Musa, the son of Ja`far, with You
through whom I seek nearness to You
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
Eight Hour -imam `ali Ibn Musa Al-rida (`a)

The eighth hour, which is the space of time between the amount of four units of prayer after the Noon Prayer and the Afternoon Prayer, is dedicated to Imam `Ali ibn Musa al-Rida (`a). The supplication at this hour is the following:

translation.en: O Best of all besought ones!
O Best of all givers!
O Best of all asked ones!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَضَاءَ بِاسْمِهِ ضَوْءُ ٱلنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: ya man ada'a bismihi daw'u alnnahari

translation.en: O He by Whose Name the light of days beams,
the darkness of nights dims,
the heavy rain of floods flows,
and has provided His intimate servants with all prosperity!
O He Whose light has gone up the heavens,
Whose beam has gone up the earth,
and Whose mercy has gone up the east and the west!
O Ample in magnanimity,

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ ٱلرِّضَا

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of `Ali, the son of Musa, the well-contented,
peace be upon both of them,
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
Ninth Hour Imam Muhammad Ibn `ali Al-taqi (`a)
The ninth hour, which is the space of time between the Afternoon Prayer up to two hours after that, is dedicated to Imam Muhammad ibn `Ali al-Taqi (`a). The supplication at this hour is as follows:

translation.en: O He Who, when the distressed prayed Him, responded to them,
when the afraid had recourse with Him, granted them security,
when the obedient served Him, thanked them,
when the believers thanked Him, favored upon them,
when they obeyed Him, safeguarded them,
when they asked Him, gave them,

segments.arabic: وَنَسُوا نِعْمَتَهُ فَلَمْ يُخْلِ شُكْرَهُ مِنْ قُلُوبِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa nasu ni`matahu falam yukhli shukrahu min qulubihim

translation.en: and when they forgot His grace, did not evacuate thanking Him from their hearts;

segments.arabic: وَٱمْتَنَّ عَلَيْهِمْ فَلَمْ يَجْعَلِ ٱسْمَهُ مَنْسِيّاً عِنْدَهُمْ

translation.en: and He favored them when He did not make His Name forgotten by them.
I beseech You in the name of Muhammad, the son of `Ali,
peace be upon both of them,
You conclusive argument,
affluent grace,
and patent course,
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
Tenth Hour- Imam `ali Ibn Muhammad Al-naqi (`a)

The tenth hour, which is the space of time between two hours after the Afternoon Prayer and the time before the sun is colored yellowish, is dedicated to Imam `Ali ibn Muhammad al-Naqi (`a). The following is the supplication at this hour:

translation.en: O He Who is Exalted and thus All-great!
O He Who is All-powerful and thus Omnipotent!
O He Who is Omnipotent and thus All-powerful!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَزَّ فَٱسْتَكْبَرَ فِي عِزِّهِ

translation.en: O He Who is Almighty and thus All-grand in His almightiness!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ مَدَّ ٱلظِّلَّ عَلَىٰ خَلْقِهِ

translation.en: O He Who extended the shadow on His creatures!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنِ ٱمْتَنَّ بِٱلْمَعْرُوفِ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ

translation.en: O He Who has conferred upon His servants with favors!
O Mighty and Lord of retribution!

segments.arabic: يَا مُنْتَقِماً بِعِزَّتِهِ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلشِّرْكِ
segments.transliteration: ya muntaqiman bi`izzatihi min ahli alshshirki

translation.en: O He Who retaliates upon the people of polytheism by His Might!
I beseech You in the name of `Ali, the son of Muhammad,
peace be upon both of them,
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
Eleventh Hour Imam Al-hasan Ibn `ali Al-`askari (`a)

The eleventh hour, which extends from the time before the yellowishing of the sun up to the time when it is colored yellowish, is dedicated to Imam al-Hasan ibn `Ali al-`Askari (`a). The supplication at this hour is the following:

translation.en: O Foremost without having beginning!
O Ultimate without having end!
O Self-Subsisting without there being termination of His eternity!
O Almighty without cessation of His almightiness!

segments.arabic: يَا مُتَسَلِّطاً بِلاَ ضَعْفٍ مِنْ سُلْطَانِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya mutasallitan bila da`fin min sultanihi

translation.en: O All-powerful without there being weak point in His overpowering!
O All-generous along with perpetuity of His graces!
O Omnipotent and Dignifier of His intimate servants!
O All-aware in His knowledge!
O All-knowledgeable in His power!
O Powerful in His Essence!
I beseech You in the name of al-Hasan, the son of `Ali,
peace be upon both of them,
and I present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
Twelfth Hour Imam Al Mahdi (Ajtfs)

The twelfth hour of the day begins with the sun coloring yellowish and ends with sunset. This hour is dedicated to Imam al-Mahdi the Patron of the Age (`a), and the following is the supplication at this hour:

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَوَحَّدَ بِنَفْسِهِ عَنْ خَلْقِهِ

translation.en: O He Who has excluded Himself lonely from His creatures!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ غَنِيَ عَنْ خَلْقِهِ بِصُنْعِهِ

translation.en: O He Who has sufficed Himself from His creatures by His making!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَرَّفَ نَفْسَهُ خَلْقَهُ بِلُطْفِهِ

translation.en: O He Who has introduced Himself to His creatures out of His gentleness!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ سَلَكَ بِأَهْلِ طَاعَتِهِ مَرْضَاتَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man salaka bi'ahli ta`atihi mardatahu

translation.en: O He Who has led the people of obedience to Him to His pleasure!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَعَانَ اهْلَ مَحَبَّتِهِ عَلَىٰ شُكْرِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: ya man a`ana ahla mahabbatihi `ala shukrihim

translation.en: O He Who has helped the people of love for Him to thank Him!
O He Who has conferred upon them with the favor of His religion
and has been kind to them through His rewards!

segments.arabic: أَسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ ٱلْخَلَفِ ٱلصَّالِحِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the regard of the Righteous Successor, peace be upon him, with You,
implore to You in his name,
and present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the men of authority whom You have ordered us to obey,

segments.arabic: وَ أُولِي ٱلأََرْحَامِ ٱلَّذِينَ أَمَرْتَ بِصِلَتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa uli al-arhami alladhina amarta bisilatihim

translation.en: the kindred by blood whom You have ordered us to connect,

segments.transliteration: wa dhawi alqurba alladhina amarta bimawaddatihim

translation.en: the relatives whom You have ordered us to love,
the masters whom You have ordered us to recognize their right,

segments.arabic: وَأَهْلِ ٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلَّذِينَ أَذْهَبْتَ عَنْهُمُ ٱلرِّجْسَ وَطَهَّرْتَهُمْ تَطْهِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa ahli albayti alladhina adhhabta `anhum alrrijsa wa tahhartahum tathiran

translation.en: and the People of the House from whom You have removed away filth and whom You have purified with thorough purifying,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: You may now mention your needs.
Three Special Hours

In his book of Miqbas al-Masabih, `Allamah al-Majlisi says: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported through valid chains of authority to have said: There are three hours at night and three others at day at which Allah, the Almighty and Majestic, glorifies Himself. The three hours of days begin when the sun in the east side is in the same rising in the afternoon on the other (west) side; that is at early forenoon. The three hours of night begin at the last third of night up to dawn. Any servant glorifies Allah, the Almighty and Majestic, at these hours with full heart presence, Almighty Allah will settle his needs, and if he is unhappy (because of sinning), I expect that he will be made happy.
It is most suitable to say the following words of glorification at these hours:

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta rabbu al`alamina

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the Lord of the Worlds.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta alrrahmanu alrrahimu

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ ٱلْعَلِيُّ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta al`aliyyu alkabiru

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the All-High, the All-great.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ مَلِكُ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta maliku yawmi alddini

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the Master of the Judgment Day.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta alghafuru alrrahimu

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta al`azizu alhakimu

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the Almighty, the All-wise.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ مِنْكَ بَدْءُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta minka bad'u kulli shay'in

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, from You is the beginning of all things
and to You do all things return.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ لَمْ تَزَلْ وَلاَ تَزَالُ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu alladhi la ilaha illa anta lam tazal wa la tazalu

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, You have been always existent and You will always be existent.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ خَالِقُ ٱلْخَيْرِ وَٱلشَّرِّ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta khaliqu alkhayri walshsharri

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the Creator of good and evil.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ خَالِقُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta khaliqu aljannati walnnari

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the Creator of Paradise and Hell.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ ٱلاحَدُ ٱلصَّمَدُ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta al-ahadu alssamadu

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the One and the eternally besought of all.
He begets not nor was begotten

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun

translation.en: and there is none comparable to Him.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْقُدُّوسُ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta almaliku alquddusu

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You, the King, the All-holy,
the Giver of peace, the Granter of security, the Guardian over all,
the Almighty, the Omnipotent, and the Grand.
Glory be to Allah from what they set up with Him.
You are Allah; the Creator, the Originator, and the Fashioner.
Yours are the most excellent names.

segments.arabic: يُسَبِّحُ لَكَ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَوَاتِ وَٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: yusabbihu laka ma fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: Whatever is in the heavens and the earth declares Your glory;
and You are the Almighty, the All-wise.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: You are Allah; there is no god save You,
the Great, the Most High. Grandeur is Your dress.

text.en: It is highly emphasized to do ABLUTIONS /WUDHOO before going to sleep
The Prophet (saws) informed his daughter Fatima (sa) that before going to bed she should do 4 things
1)Recite Sura Ikhlass 3 times.This is like Reciting full Quran
2)Recite Salwaat 10 times This will get intercession from Prophets

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma Salle Ala Muhammadin Wa Aale Muhammad"

translation.en: O Allah send blessings on Muhammad & his family

text.en: 3)Seek Forgiveness for all believers This is equal to making all believers happy
Allahuma maghfir le momineen wal moninaat "
O Allah Please forgive all the believeing me & women
4) Recite

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ وَ اللهُ اَكْبَر
segments.transliteration: Subhaanallaahi wa’l hamdu lillaahi wa laa ilaaha illallaahu wallaahu Akbar .

translation.en: Glory be to God, and praise be to God; there is no god but Allah, and Allah is Greater  .This is equal to doing Haj & Umra

text.en: Imam Ali(as) recommends Recite 4 times Sura Al Hamd ' for sawab of giving 4000 dirhams sadqa & recite Astaghfirullah' 10 times to sawab of resolving disputes between momins
Recite the Tasbeeh e Fatima (sa)before going to bed.
SEVEN PRAYERS FROM BAQIYATUS SALEHAT at bedtime and at waking are as follows:

First: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: Whoever repeats the following three times before going to bed, will be released of his sins as exactly as he was on the day his mother gave birth to him:

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has exalted, thus dominated.
All praise be to Allah Who has been immanent, thus known all things.
All praise be to Allah Who has owned all things, thus had power over them all.
All praise be to Allah Who gives life to the dead,
causes the living to die,
and He has power over all things.

text.en: Second: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) has mentioned that whenever the Holy Prophet (s) went to sleep, he would recite ªyah al-Kursi and then say the following statement:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah.
I believe in Allah
and disavow the false deity.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱحْفَظْنِي فِي مَنَامِي وَفِي يَقَظَتِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma ihfazni fi manami wa fi yaqazati

translation.en: O Allah, (please) safeguard me in my sleep and in my waking.

text.en: Third: Al-Mufaddal ibn `Umar reported the following: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) said to me: If possible, you should not go to bed at night before you pray for the protection of the following

translation.en: I pray the protection of Allah’s almightiness,
I pray the protection of Allah’s omnipotence,
I pray the protection of Allah’s majesty,
I pray the protection of Allah’s authority,
I pray the protection of Allah’s beauty,
I pray the protection of Allah’s defense,
I pray the protection of Allah’s guard,
I pray the protection of Allah’s wholeness,
I pray the protection of Allah’s control,
I pray the protection of Allah’s face,
and I pray the protection of Allah’s Messenger,
may Allah bless him and his Household,

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ وَبَرَا وَذَرَا
segments.transliteration: min sharri ma khalaqa wa bara'a wa dhara'a

translation.en: against the evil of whatever He has created, originated, and made.

text.en: Fourth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said, “Whoever repeats Surah al-Tawhid (No. 112) one hundred times before he goes to sleep, Almighty Allah will forgive him the sins of fifty years.”

Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is also reported to have said, to  recite Surah <ref=1:109>Al-Kafiroon</ref>
 and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 before he goes to sleep…

Fifth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) reported the Holy Prophet (s) as saying: Whoever intends to wake up at a particular time , may say the following words before he goes to sleep. If he does, Almighty Allah will order an angel to awaken him at the very time he intends to wake up:

translation.en: O Allah, (please) do not make me feel secure against Your plans,
do not make me forget remembrance of You,
and do not include me with the inattentive ones.
I may wake up at… (The time at which one intends to wake up may be mentioned now.)

text.en: Sixth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: When one of you wakes up at night, he may say the following. If he does, Almighty Allah will say, “My servant has said the truth and has thanked Me.”

translation.en: All glory be to Allah the Lord of the prophets,
the God of the messengers,
and the Lord of the enfeebled ones.
All praise be to Allah Who gives life to the dead
and He has power over all things.

text.en: Seventh: `Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj has reported that Imam al-Sadiq (`a), whenever he woke up at the last hours of night, would raise his voice with this prayer so that the people of his house would hear him:

translation.en: O Allah, help me stand the horror of the after-death scene,
expand for me the narrow abode,
provide me with the welfare of what is before death,
and provide me with the welfare of what is after death.

text.en: DUA UPON WAKING UP. The Imaam said that anyone who wakes up from sleep and recites the following Duaa shall be considered a grateful servant of Almighty Allah (swt):

translation.en: All glory be to Allah the Lord of the prophets,
the God of the messengers,
and the Lord of the enfeebled ones.
All praise be to Allah Who gives life to the dead
and He has power over all things.

text.en: Lady Fatima (sa) supplication while going to bed -Sahifa Fatima (sa)

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الْكَافِيْ، سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْاَعْلٰى، حَسْبِىَ اللهُ وَ كَفٰى، مَا شَاءَ اللهُ قَضٰى، سَمِعَ اللهُ لِمَنْ دَعَا، لَيْسَ مِنَ اللهِ مَلْجَاٌ، وَ لَا وَرَاءَ اللهِ مُلْتَجَاٌ.
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil kaafee, subhaanal laahil a-a’laa, hasbeyal laaho wa kafaa, maa shaa allaho qazaa, same-a’l laaho leman da-a’a, laysa menal laahe malja-un, wa laa waraa allahe multaja-un.

translation.en: All praise is for that God, Who is sufficient and Who is pure and untainted is the God, Who is lofty and great. Allah is sufficient for me and He does whatever He likes. He harkens to the supplication of every supplicant. There is no refuge other than Allah, and there is no protection other than Him.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَي اللہِ رَبِّيْ وَرَبِّكُمْ۝۰ۭ مَا مِنْ دَاۗبَّۃٍ اِلَّا ہُوَ اٰخِذٌۢ بِنَاصِيَتِہَا۝۰ۭ اِنَّ رَبِّيْ عَلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسْتَقِيْمٍ.
segments.transliteration: tawakkalto a’lal laahe rabbee wa rabbekum, maa min daabbatin illaa howa aakhezun be-naaseyatehaa, inna rabbee a’laa seraatim mustaqeem.

translation.en: I rely upon Allah, Who is my Lord and your Lord and everything that moves on the surface of the earth is within His control. Indeed, the path of My Lord is the straight path.[1]

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلہِ الَّذِيْ لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَدًا وَّ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَّہٗ شَرِيْكٌ فِيْ الْمُلْكِ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَّہٗ وَلِيٌّ مِّنَ الذُّلِّ وَكَبِّرْہُ تَكْبِيْرًا.
segments.transliteration: al-hamdolil laahil lazee lam yattakhiz waladanw wa lam yakul lahu shareekun fil mulke wa lam yakul lahu waliyyum menaz zulle wa kabbirho takbeeraa.

translation.en: All praise is for that God, who did not deem anyone as His son nor is there any partner in His kingdom or a support in His weakness. And it is incumbent on everyone to confess to His greatness.[2]

text.en: Her supplication for preventing nightmares

segments.arabic: اَعُوْذُ بِمَا عَاذَتْ بِهٖ مَلَائِكَةُ اللهِ الْمُقَرَّبُوْنَ، وَ اَنْبِيَاءُ اللهِ الْمُرْسَلُوْنَ، وَ عِبَادُهُ اللهِ الصَّالِحُونَ، مِنْ شَرِّ رُؤْيَايَ الَّتِيْ رَاَيْتُ: اَنْ تَضُرَّنِيْ فِيْ دِيْنِيْ وَ دُنْيَايَ.‏
segments.transliteration: a-o’ozo bemaa a’azat behi malaa-ekatul laahil moqarraboona, wa anbeyaa-ul laahil mursaloona, wa e’baadul laahis saalehoona, min sharre roayaayal latee ra-ayto: an tazurranee fee deenee wa dunyaaya.

translation.en: I seek refuge of the one, whose refuge is sought by the proximate angels, prophets, messengers, and the righteous from the mischief of the dreams that I see: that prove harmful in the world and the hereafter.

text.en: After that spit thrice on the left.
Visiting the Graves of the Faithful Believers

The trustworthy and sublime Shaykh Ja’far ibn Qawlawayh al-Qummi reports ‘Amr ibn ‘Uthman al-Razi as saying that he heard Imam Abu’l-Hasan Musa ibn Ja’far, peace be upon him, saying, “Whoever is unable to visit us, may visit the righteous adherents of us. If he does so, he will be endued with the reward of visiting us. Likewise, whoever is unable to connect us, may connect the righteous adherents of us. If he does so, he will also be endued with the reward of connecting us.”Through an authentic chain of authority, Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Yahya al-Ash’ari is reported to have said, “I was in Fayd (a station on the way of Makkah) when I accompanied ‘Ali ibn Bilal in visiting the grave of Muhammad ibn Isma’il ibn Buzaygh. ‘Ali related to me, saying: The one buried in this grave told me that Imam al-Rida (‘a) said, ‘Whoever comes to the graves of his brother-in-faith and puts his hand on the grave and recites <ref=1:97>Surah Al-Qadr</ref>
 seven times, will be secured on the Great Horror Day.”

According to another tradition, the statement, ‘... and directs his face towards the kiblah direction...’ is added. From the apparent point of this tradition, we may understand that security on the Resurrection Day will be for the one who recites that Surah (i.e. the visitor of the grave) although it is probable that the one intended may be the visited one. This meaning is supported by a coming report of Sayyid Ibn Tawus: In the book of Kamil al-Ziyarah, it is reported through a valid chain of authority that ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Abu-’Abdullah asked Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) to teach him how to put his hands of the graves of Muslims. Teaching him, the Imam (‘a) put his hand on the ground while facing the kiblah direction.

Through an authentic chain of authority, ‘Abdullah ibn Sinan has reported that he asked Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) to teach him how to salute the inhabitants in graves. The Imam (‘a) replied that he might say the following words:

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ اهْلِ ٱلدِّيَارِ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala ahli alddiyari min almu'minina walmuslimina

translation.en: Peace be upon the inhabitants of these graves, the faithful believers and Muslims.
You have preceded us,

segments.arabic: وَنَحْنُ إِنْ شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ بِكُمْ لاَحِقُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa nahnu in sha'a allahu bikum lahiquna

translation.en: and we, Allah willing, shall join you.

text.en: Imam al-Husayn, peace be upon him, is reported to have said that whoever enters a graveyard and says the following words, Almighty Allah will record for him rewards that are as many as the creatures from the time of (Prophet) Adam up to the coming of the Hour (of Resurrection):

translation.en: O Allah, O Lord of these extinct souls,
rotten bodies,
and crumbled bones

segments.arabic: ٱلَّتِي خَرَجَتْ مِنَ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَهِيَ بِكَ مُؤْمِنَةٌ
segments.transliteration: allati kharajat min alddunya wa hiya bika mu'minatun

translation.en: that left this worldly life bearing faith in You,

segments.arabic: ادْخِلْ عَلَيْهِمْ رَوْحاً مِنْكَ وَسَلاَماً مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: adkhil `alayhim rawhan minka wa salaman minni

translation.en: (please) insert into them rest from You and salutation from me.

text.en: کتب الله له بعدد الخلق من لدن آدم إلى أن تقوم الساعة حسنات

Imam ‘Ali, peace be upon him, is reported to have said that whoever enters a graveyard and says the following words, Almighty Allah will grant him the reward of fifty-year worship and erases from him and his parents the punishment of fifty-year wrongdoings:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ اهْلِ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `la ahli la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: Peace be upon the group of “There is no god save Allah”

segments.arabic: مِنْ اهْلِ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: min ahli la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: from the group of “There is no god save Allah.”

segments.arabic: يَا اهْلَ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya ahla la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: O group of “There is no god save Allah,”
in the name of “There is no god save Allah,”

segments.arabic: كَيْفَ وَجَدْتُمْ قَوْلَ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: kayfa wajadtum qawla la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: how have you found the profession of “There is no god save Allah”
from “There is no god save Allah?”
O He to Whom “There is no god save Allah” is said,
I beseech You in the name of “There is no god save Allah”

segments.arabic: ٱغْفِرْ لِمَنْ قَالَ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ighfir liman qala la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: to forgive any one who professed that “There is no god save Allah”

segments.arabic: وَٱحْشُرْنَا فِي زُمْرَةِ مَنْ قَالَ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wahshurna fi zumrati man qala la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: and to include us in the group of those who professed that “There is no god save Allah.
Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.
`Ali is the authority from Allah.”

text.en: أعطاه الله سبحانه وتعالى ثواب خمسين سنة وكفّر عنه وعن أبويه سيئات خمسين سنة ـ ولأبويه أيضاً ـ .
According to another tradition, the best thing to be said whenever one passes by a graveyard is the following words, after stopping there:

translation.en: O Allah, (please) turn them to that to which they have turned
and join them to those whom they have loved.

text.en: In his book of Misbah al-Za’ir, Sayyid ibn Tawus says: When you intend to visit the graves of the faithful believers, you may choose Thursday; otherwise, you may visit them on any other day. To do so, you may turn your face towards the kiblah direction, put your hand on the grave, and say the following supplicatory words:

translation.en: O Allah, (please) have mercy on his strangeness,
connect his loneliness,
entertain his isolation,
secure his horror,
attach Your mercy to him;

segments.arabic: رَحْمَةً يَسْتَغْنِي بِهَا عَنْ رَحْمَةِ مَنْ سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: rahmatan yastaghni biha `an rahmati man siwaka

translation.en: such mercy by which he can do without the mercy of anyone other than You,
and join him to those to whom he has adhered.

text.en:
You may then recite <ref=1:97>Surah Al-Qadr</ref>
 seven times.

The method and rewards of visiting the graves of faithful believers have been demonstrated in another tradition reported from Fuzayl who, accordingly, said: As to any one who recites Surah al-Qadr at the grave of a faithful believer seven times, Almighty Allah will send to him an angel who will worship Him (i.e. Almighty Allah) next to that grave and the reward of all the devotional acts that are done by that angel will be recorded for the dead person. When Almighty Allah raises him from the grave, He will make easy for him all the horrors by which he will pass until he is allowed to enter Paradise. Along with <ref=1:97>Surah Al-Qadr</ref>
, Surah al-Fatihah , Surah al-Tawhid , <ref=1:113>Surah Al-Falaq</ref> and <ref=1:114>Surah Al-Nas</ref> 
, and <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref> may be also recited three times each.
