Another tradition on the same subject reads that Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Imam al-Sadiq, peace be upon him, “Should we visit the dead people?” “Yes, you should,” replied the Imam. “Will they know about us when we visit them?” asked Muhammad. “Yes, I swear it by Allah,” said the Imam (‘a), “they do know about you, feel glad with that, and find entertainment with your visits.” “What should we say when we visit them?” asked Muhammad. The Imam answered, “You may say the following words:

translation.en: O Allah, (please) prevent the soil from harming their sides,
take their souls up to You,
increase Your pleasure with them,
and make part of Your mercy dwell with them
so that You will save them from loneliness
and entertain their isolation.
Verily, You have power over all things.”

text.en: Sayyid Ibn Tawus then added: While you are in a graveyard, you should recite Surah al-Tawhid eleven times and dedicate the reward to the dead. It has been reported that Almighty Allah will reward the one who does so as many folds as the number of the dead persons in that graveyard.

In the book of Kamil al-Ziyarah, Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) is reported to have said, “If you visit your dead people before sunrise, they will hear and reply to you. If you visit them after sunrise, they will hear you but they will not reply you.”

In al-Rawandi’s book of al-Da’awat, there is a tradition reported from the Holy Prophet (s) entailing discommendation of visiting the dead at night. The Holy Prophet (s) is reported to have said to Abu-Dharr, “Do not visit them frequently at night.”

In the collection of Shaykh al-Shahid, the Holy Prophet (s) is reported to have said: Whoever repeats the following words at a grave three times, Almighty Allah shall certainly remove from the dead person in that grave the chastisement on the Resurrection Day:
وروي في مجموعة الشيخ الشهيد عن رسول الله صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله قال : لا يقول أحد عند قبر ميّت ثلاث مرات :

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ أَنْ لا تُعَذِّبَ هذا المَيِّتِ.

translation.en: O Allah, I do beseech You in the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad not to torment this dead.

text.en: The following tradition is recorded in the book of Jami’ al-Akhbar as reported from one of the Holy Prophet’s companions: One day, the Holy Prophet (s) said, “Give presents to your dead people.” “O Allah’s Messenger,” we asked, “what should we give as presents to our dead people?” “You should present them alms and supplications,” instructed the Holy Prophet (s). He then added, “Every Friday, the souls of the believers come down to the lowest sky directly on their houses and homes and each one of them cry out with sad tone and weep, saying, ‘O my family members! O my sons! O my father! O my mother! O my relatives! Be kind to us, may Allah have mercy upon you, by presenting us some of that which was possessed by us! Now, woe and perdition are to us while the benefits are to others!’ Each one of the dead then cry out to his relatives, saying, ‘Be kind to us by giving as alms a dirham, a loaf of bread, or a dress so that Almighty Allah will dress you from the garments of Paradise.’” The Holy Prophet (s) then wept so heavily that he could not keep on talking. We also wept. He then added, “Those are your brothers-in-faith. They became rotten dust after pleasure and bliss. They now express grief and lamentation, saying, ‘Woe be to us! Had we given as alms all that which was possessed by us, seeking Almighty Allah’s pleasure and obeying Him, we would not have been in need for you.’ They then return with regret and grief, calling out, ‘Hurry up in giving the alms of the dead!’” The Holy Prophet (s) is also reported to have said, “Whatever alms you give on behalf of the dead, an angel will take that alms in a plate of light, while the alms is shining, to the seventh sky. He then stops at the brink of a ditch and says, ‘Peace be upon you, O inhabitants of the graves. Your people have gifted you this present.’ As the angel enters the grave with that alms, these graves are extended for their inhabitants. Verily, whoever dedicates an alms to a dead person will be given by Almighty Allah rewards that are as great as Mount Uhud. On the Resurrection Day, he will be placed under the shadow of Almighty Allah’s Throne when there shall be no shadow except Allah’s. Because of that alms, he will be saved in his lifetime and after his death.” It has been told that the governor of Khurasan was seen in dream saying, “Send to me the leftovers that you give to the dogs, because I am in urgent need for these leftovers.”
Imam Mahdi(ajtfs) Short DuasShort Duas- Imam Mahdi ajtfs.
1-Kunle
Ghareeq
Marefat
Faraj-Azumal
Tawfiq aTaa
Haqqe Naja
Asleh
12th Hour
Ziaraat

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ كُنْ لِوَلِيّكَ الحُجّةِ ابْنِ الحَسَنِ

translation.en: O Allah, be, for Your representative, the Hujjat (proof), son of Al­Hassan,
Your blessings be on him and his forefathers,

segments.arabic: فِي هذِهِ السَّاعَةِ وَفي كُلّ سَاعَةٍ
segments.transliteration: fee haazehis saa-a'te wa fee kulle saa-a'tin

translation.en: in this hour and in every hour,
a guardian, a protector,
a leader, a helper,
a proof, and an eye.
until You make him live on the earth, in obedience (to You),& Cause him to live in it for a long timeAuthenticity and answer to doubts

segments.arabic: يَا اَللَّهُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya rahmanu ya rahimu

translation.en: O Allah! O All-beneficent! O All-merciful!
O Turner of hearts!
Keep firm my heart on your religion

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِىْ نَفْسَك َ - فَاِنَّكَ اِنْ لَّمْ تُعَرِّ فْنِىْ نَفْسَكَ لَمْ اَعْرِفْ رَسُوْلَكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma a'arifni nafsak. Fa innaka in lam to arrifni nafsaka lam a'rif nabiyeka.

translation.en: O Allah introduce Your self to me - For, if you do not introduce Your self to me, I will not recognize Your Prophet (saws).

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِىْ رَسُوْلَكَ - فَاِنَّكَ اِنْ لَمْ تُعَرِّ فْنِىْ رَسُوْلَكَ لَمْ اَعْرِفْ حُجَّتَكَ
segments.transliteration: Allhumma a'rifni rasoolaka fa innaka in lam to a'rifni rasoolaka, lam a'rif hujjatak.

translation.en: O Allah make me recognize Your Prophet (saws) ,- because if I do not recognize Your Prophet (saws), I will not recognize Your Proof [Imam (as)].

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عَرِّفْنِىْ حُجَّتَكَ - فَاِنَّكَ اِنْ لَّمْ تُعَرِّ فْنِىْ حُجَّتَكَ ضَلَلْتُ عَنْ دِيْنِىْ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma a'rrifni hujjatak fa innaka in lam to a'rifni hujjatak, zalal to an deeni.

translation.en: O Allah make me recognize Your Proof (Imam) - For, if you do not make me recognize Your Proof , I will deviate from my religion
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful
O my Lord! The calamity has aggravated; the absence prolonged;
The curtain of modesty has been lifted; hope has been curtailed;
The earth has been narrow; and sky has been denied.
And You are the One from whom help is sought and complaints are made

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَيْكَ الْمُعَوَّلُ فِيْ الشِّدَّةِ وَالرَّخَاءِ،

translation.en: And in You we trust in the times of difficulty.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَي مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma salli ‘ala Muhammad wa ali Muhammad

translation.en: O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad (S) and the progeny of Muhammad (S),

segments.arabic: أُوْلِي الْأَمْرِ الَّذِيْنَ فَرَضْتَ عَلَيْنَا طَا عَتَهُمْ

translation.en: The possessors of authority whose obedience you have enjoined upon us

segments.arabic: وَ عَرَّفْتَنَا بِذَالِكَ مَنْزِلَتَهُمْ ، فَفَّرِجْ عَنَّا بِحَقِّهِمْ فَرَجاً عَاجِلاً قَرِيْباً كَلَمْحِ الْبَصَرِ أَوْ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ
segments.transliteration: Wa ‘arraftana bidhalika manzilatahum fafarrij ‘anna bi-haqqihim farajan ‘ajilan qariban kalamhi’l-basari aw huwa aqrab

translation.en: And by that made us aware of their position. Then make open for us, by their truth, an immediate opening, immediate as a wink or sooner.
O Muhammad! O 'Ali! O 'Ali! O Muhammad!

segments.arabic: ِكْفِيَانِيْ فَإِنَّكُمَا كَافِيَانِ وَ انْصُرَانِيْ فَإِنَّكُمَا نَاصِرَانِ
segments.transliteration: Ikfiyani fainnakuma kafiyani wa’n-surani fainnakuma nasiran

translation.en: Suffice me both of you as both of you are sufficient.Help me—two of you—for you are my helpers.
O our Master, O Master of the Time!
Help! Help!
Rescue me! Rescue me! Rescue me!
This moment! This moment! This moment!

text.en: You may then slap your right thigh with your hand three times and, at each time, say the following words:

translation.en: Hasten, hasten, hasten!

segments.arabic: يَا أَرْحَمَ لرَّاحِمِيْنَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِهِ الطَّا هِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: Ya arhama’r-rahimina bi-haqqi Muhammad wa alihi’t-tahirin

translation.en: O Most Merciful of the Merciful,For the sake of Muhammad (S) and his holy progeny.
O Allah, (please do) grant us success to obey (You),
remoteness from disobedience (to You),
true intention,
and identification of sanctity.
(Please do) honor us with true guidance and straightforwardness,
dedicate our tongues to truth and wisdom,
fill our hearts with knowledge and learning,

segments.transliteration: wa tahhir butunana mina alharami walshshubhati

translation.en: purify our stomachs from illegally and suspiciously gotten food,
withhold our hands from oppression and larceny,
turn our sights away from licentiousness and treachery,
and block our hearings against vainness and backbiting,

segments.transliteration: wa tafaddal ʿala ʿulama'ina bilzzuhdi walnnasihati

translation.en: confer upon our scholars with asceticism and advice,
upon the learners with hard work and desire (to learning),
upon the listeners with following and learning (lessons),

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala marda almuslimina bilshshafa'i walrrahati

translation.en: upon the Muslim patients with cure and comfort,
upon the dead Muslims with kindness and mercy,
upon our aged people with somberness and gentleness,
upon the youths with turning (to You) and repentance,
upon the women with shyness and chastity,
upon the rich with modesty and ample giving,
upon the poor with patience and satisfaction,
upon the warriors with triumph and supremacy,
upon the prisoners with release and comfort,
upon the rulers with justice and sympathy,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala alrraʿiyyati bil-insafi wa husni alssirati

translation.en: and upon the subjects with impartiality and good behavior.

segments.arabic: وَبَارِكْ لِلْحُجَّاجِ وَالزُّوَّارِ فِي ٱلزَّادِ وَٱلنَّفَقَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa barik lilhujjaji walzzuwwari fi alzzadi walnnafaqati

translation.en: (Please do) bless the pilgrims to Mecca and the visitors (of the tombs of the saints) with provision and expenditure,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْضِ مَا اوْجَبْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنَ ٱلْحَجِّ وَٱلْعُمْرَةِ
segments.transliteration: waqdi ma awjabta ʿalayhim min alhajj walʿumrati

translation.en: and help them settle the Hajj and `Umrah that You have made incumbent upon them,

segments.transliteration: bifadlika wa rahmatika ya arhama alrrahimina

translation.en: in the name of Your grace and mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy!
O my God, in the name of all those who have besought you

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّ مَنْ دَعَاكَ فِي ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi man daʿaka fi albarri walbahri

translation.en: and in the name of all those who have prayed to you in lands and seas,
(please do) bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa tafaddal ʿala fuqara'i almu'minina walmu'minati

translation.en: bestow upon the poor among the believing men and women
with wealth and fortune,
upon the ailed believing men and women
with healing and health,
upon the living believing men and women
with kindness and generosity,
upon the dead believing men and women
with forgiveness and mercy,
and upon the emigrant believing men and women
with returning them home peacefully and successfully,
in the name of Muhammad and the members of his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَ أصْلِحْ عَبدَكَ وَ خَليفَتَكَ بِما أَصْلَحْتَ بِهِ أنبياءَكَ و رُسُلَكَ!
segments.transliteration: allahumma aslih ‘abdaka wa khalieefataka bima aslahta bihi anbiya-aka wa rusulak

translation.en: O Allah! Reform conditions of Your servant and caliph with those means by which You have reformed conditions of Your messengers and prophets.

segments.arabic: وَ حُفَّهُ بِمَلائِكَتِكَ وَ أَيَّدْهُ بِروُحِ القُدُسِ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa huffahu bi-malaaikatika wa ayyad-hu bi-ruhil-qudusi min ‘indik

translation.en: Surround him with the angels and support him with the Holy Spirit.

segments.arabic: وَ اسْلُكْهُ مِن بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ و مِنْ خَلْفِهِ رَصَداً،يَحْفظُونَهُ مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ!
segments.transliteration: was-lukhu mim bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi rasadan, yahfadhunahu min kulli sooin

translation.en: Appoint protectors from the front and behind him, (those) who would guard him from all troubles and calamities.

segments.arabic: وَ أبْدِلَهُ مِنْ بَعْدِ خَوْفِهِ أمْنَاً يَعْبُدُكَ لا يُشرِكَ بِكَ شَيئاً،
segments.transliteration: wa abdil-hu mim ba’adi khawfihi amnan ya’abuduka la yushrika bika shay-an

translation.en: Convert his fear into security, (as) he worships only You and doesn't associate anybody with You.

segments.arabic: وَ لا تَجْعَلْ لِأحَدِ مِنْ خَلقِكَ عَلي وَليِّكَ سُلطاناً!
segments.transliteration: wa laa taj’al li-ahad-im-min khalqika ‘alaa waliyyika sultanan

translation.en: Do not make any of Your creatures an authority over Your vicegerent.

segments.arabic: وَ أْذَنْ لَه في جِهَادِ عَدُوِّكَ وَ عَدوِّه!
segments.transliteration: wa(‘) dhan lahu fee jihadi ‘aduwwika wa ‘aduwwihi

translation.en: Permit him to fight against Your enemies and his enemies
and include me among his helpers.
Surely You possess power over everything.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَوَحَّدَ بِنَفْسِهِ عَنْ خَلْقِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man tawahhada binafsihi ʿan khalqihi

translation.en: O He Who has excluded Himself lonely from His creatures!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ غَنِيَ عَنْ خَلْقِهِ بِصُنْعِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man ghaniya ʿan khalqihi bisunʿihi

translation.en: O He Who has sufficed Himself from His creatures by His making!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَرَّفَ نَفْسَهُ خَلْقَهُ بِلُطْفِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man ʿarrafa nafsahu khalqahu bilutfihi

translation.en: O He Who has introduced Himself to His creatures out of His gentleness!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ سَلَكَ بِاهْلِ طَاعَتِهِ مَرْضَاتَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man salaka bi'ahli taʿatihi mardatahu

translation.en: O He Who has led the people of obedience to Him to His pleasure!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ اعَانَ اهْلَ مَحَبَّتِهِ عَلَىٰ شُكْرِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: ya man aʿana ahla mahabbatihi ʿala shukrihim

translation.en: O He Who has helped the people of love for Him to thank Him!
O He Who has conferred upon them with the favor of His religion
and has been kind to them through His rewards!

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ ٱلْخَلَفِ ٱلصَّالِحِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bihaqqi alkhalafi alssalihi ʿalayhi alssalamu ʿalayka

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the regard of the Righteous Successor, peace be upon him, with You,
implore to You in his name,
and present him as my mediation for the settling of my needs,

segments.arabic: انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the men of authority whom You have ordered us to obey,

segments.transliteration: wa uli al-arhami alladhina amarta bisilatihim

translation.en: the kindred by blood whom You have ordered us to connect,

segments.transliteration: wa dhawi alqurba alladhina amarta bimawaddatihim

translation.en: the relatives whom You have ordered us to love,
the masters whom You have ordered us to recognize their right,

segments.arabic: وَاهْلِ ٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلَّذِينَ اذْهَبْتَ عَنْهُمُ ٱلرِّجْسَ وَطَهَّرْتَهُمْ تَطْهِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa ahli albayti alladhina adhhabta ʿanhum alrrijsa wa tahhartahum tathiran

translation.en: and the People of the House from whom You have removed away filth and whom You have purified with thorough purifying,

segments.arabic: انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and...

text.en: In his book of al-Kalim al-Tayyib, Sayyid `Ali Khan says, “The following is a form of seeking aid petition from The Argument of Allah and the Patron of the Age (Imam al-Mahdi)—peace be upon him:

Wherever you are, you may take ghusl ,offer a two-unit prayer,(beneath the sky). reciting Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and any other sura in each unit. Yet, it is preferable to read Surah <ref=1:48>Al-Fath</ref>
 in the first unit and Surah <ref=1:110>Al-Nasr</ref> 
 in the second. You may then stand up, facing the kiblah direction under the sky and then say this dua.. Salaamullah al-Kaamel…

translation.en: Peace of Allah—perfect, complete,
comprehensive, and thorough;
and His endless benedictions
and His everlasting, perfect blessings
be upon the Argument of Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa waliyyihi fi ardihi wa biladihi

translation.en: His representative in His lands and realm,
His viceroy among His creatures and servants,
the offspring of Prophethood,
the completion of the (Holy) Progeny and the Choice Ones,
the Patron of the Age,
the demonstrator of the (true) faith,
the teacher of the laws of the Qur’an,
the purger of the earth,

segments.transliteration: wa nashiri al`adli fi alttuli wal`ardi

translation.en: the spreader of justice all over the earth,
the Argument (al-Hujjah), the Riser (al-Qa’im), the Well-guided (al-Mahdi),
the Leader, the Awaited, the Pleased,
the descendant of the Infallible Imams,
the Successor, the son of the Pleased Successors (of the Prophets),
the Guide, the Immaculate,
and the son of the Imams—the guides and immaculate.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُعِزَّ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱلْمُسْتَضْعَفِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O grantor of dignity to the oppressed and faithful ones.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُذِلَّ ٱلْكَافِرِينَ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya mudhilla alkafirina almutakabbirina alzzalimina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O humiliator of the arrogant and oppressing unbelievers.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلزَّمَانِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya mawlaya ya sahiba alzzamani

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O my master, the Patron of the Age.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Believers.

segments.arabic: السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the Luminous
and the Doyenne of the women of the world.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلائِمَّةِ ٱلْحُجَجِ ٱلْمَعْصُومِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Imams—the arguments (of Allah) and Immaculate
and the leader of all creatures.
Peace be upon you, O my master
addressed by him who is loyal to your (divinely commissioned) leadership.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ انَّكَ ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلْمَهْدِيُّ قَوْلاً وَفِعْلاً
segments.transliteration: ash-hadu annaka al-imamu almahdiyyu qawlan wa fi`lan

translation.en: I bear witness that you are the well-guided Imam in word and deed,

segments.arabic: وَانْتَ ٱلَّذِي تَمْلَا ٱلارْضَ قِسْطاً وَعَدْلاً
segments.transliteration: wa anta alladhi tamla'u al-arda qistan wa `adlan

translation.en: it is you who shall fill the earth with justice and impartiality
after it will be filled with wrong and partiality.
So, may Allah hasten your reappearance,
make easy your advent,
make nearer the time of your coming,
increase the number of your supporters and backers,
and fulfill for you all that which He has promised you.
He is surely the most truthful of all those who can speak (and He has said):

segments.arabic: (وَنُرِيدُ انْ نَمُنَّ عَلَىٰ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتُضْعِفُوا فِي ٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa nuridu an namunna `ala alladhina istud`ifu fi al-ardi

translation.en: “We desired to bestow a favor upon those who were deemed weak in the land,

segments.transliteration: wa naj`alahum a'immatan wa naj`alahumu alwarithina

translation.en: make them the Imams, and make them the heirs.”
O my master! O Patron of the Age!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
My request is...

text.en: Mention your need and then go on saying:

translation.en: So, intercede for me so that it will be settled,
for I am turning my face towards you for settling my request,

segments.arabic: لِعِلْمِي انَّ لَكَ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ شَفَاعَةً مَقْبُولَةً
segments.transliteration: li`ilmi anna laka `inda allahi shafa`atan maqbulatan

translation.en: since I know for sure that you enjoy with Allah admissible word of intercession,
and praiseworthy standing.
So, I ask you in the name of Him Who granted you (i.e. the Ahl al-Bayt) exclusively the right of representing Him,
and admitted you all to keep His secrets,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱلشَّانِ ٱلَّذِي لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa bilshsha'ni alladhi lakum `inda allahi baynakum wa baynahu

translation.en: and I ask you in the name of the standing that you exclusively enjoy with Allah,

segments.arabic: سَلِ ٱللَّهَ تَعَالَىٰ فِي نُجْحِ طَلِبَتِي
segments.transliteration: sal(i) allaha ta`ala fi nujhi talibati

translation.en: to ask Allah, the Exalted, to render successful my request,
to answer my prayer,
and to relieve my grief.

text.en: You may then ask for whatever you want, and it will be settled for you, by Allah’s permission.
Refrences : Behaar al-Anwaar, vol. 102, p. 235/246
Istighatha as recomeded by Ayt Taqi Behjat for an important need
Recite 2 Rakat Salat with Al Hamd & <ref=1:48>Surah Al-Fath</ref>  in first & Al Hamd and <ref=1:110>Surah Al-Nasr</ref>  in second. In Qunoot recite Dua Faraj

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ كُنْ لِوَلِيّكَ الحُجّةِ ابْنِ الحَسَنِ

translation.en: O Allah, be, for Your representative, the Hujjat (proof), son of Al­Hassan,
Your blessings be on him and his forefathers,

segments.arabic: فِي هذِهِ السَّاعَةِ وَفي كُلّ سَاعَةٍ
segments.transliteration: fee haazehis saa-a'te wa fee kulle saa-a'tin

translation.en: in this hour and in every hour,
a guardian, a protector,
a leader, a helper,
a proof, and an eye.
until You make him live on the earth, in obedience (to
& Cause him to live in it for a long time

text.en: Then Recite Tasbih Zehra (sa)
Do Tawassul to Imam ajtfs

translation.en: O successor of al-Hasan!
O descendant [of the Infallibles] and Argument [of Allah]!
O Riser, Awaited, and Well-guided!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.

text.en: Note: In case of a important need it can be done for 14 days or 40 days
